21:83.en: And Job, when he cried unto his Lord, (saying): Lo! adversity afflicteth me, and Thou art Most Merciful of all

21:84.ar: فَاسْتَجَبْنَا لَهُ فَكَشَفْنَا مَا بِهِ مِنْ ضُرٍّ ۖ وَآتَيْنَاهُ أَهْلَهُ وَمِثْلَهُمْ م
21:84.en: Then We heard his prayer and removed that adversity from which he suffered, and We gave him his household (tha

21:85.ar: وَإِسْمَاعِيلَ وَإِدْرِيسَ وَذَا الْكِفْلِ ۖ كُلٌّ مِنَ الصَّابِرِينَ
21:85.en: And (mention) Ishmael, and Idris, and Dhu'l-Kifl. All were of the steadfast.

21:86.ar: وَأَدْخَلْنَاهُمْ فِي رَحْمَتِنَا ۖ إِنَّهُمْ مِنَ الصَّالِحِينَ
21:86.en: And We brought them in unto Our mercy. Lo! they are among the righteous.

21:87.ar: وَذَا النُّونِ إِذْ ذَهَبَ مُغَاضِبًا فَظَنَّ أَنْ لَنْ نَقْدِرَ عَلَيْهِ فَنَادَىٰ فِي ال
21:87.en: And (mention) Dhu'n-Nun, when he went off in anger and deemed that We had no power over him, but he cried out

21:88.ar: فَاسْتَجَبْنَا لَهُ وَنَجَّيْنَاهُ مِنَ الْغَمِّ ۚ وَكَذَٰلِكَ نُنْجِي الْمُؤْمِنِينَ
21:88.en: Then we heard his prayer and saved him from the anguish. Thus we save believers.

21:89.ar: وَزَكَرِيَّا إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُ رَبِّ لَا تَذَرْنِي فَرْدًا وَأَنْتَ خَيْرُ الْوَارِثِين
21:89.en: And Zachariah, when he cried unto his Lord: My Lord! Leave me not childless, though Thou art the Best of inher

21:90.ar: فَاسْتَجَبْنَا لَهُ وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُ يَحْيَىٰ وَأَصْلَحْنَا لَهُ زَوْجَهُ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ كَان
21:90.en: Then We heard his prayer, and bestowed upon him John, and adjusted his wife (to bear a child) for him. Lo! the

21:91.ar: وَالَّتِي أَحْصَنَتْ فَرْجَهَا فَنَفَخْنَا فِيهَا مِنْ رُوحِنَا وَجَعَلْنَاهَا وَابْنَهَا
21:91.en: And she who was chaste, therefor We breathed into her (something) of Our Spirit and made her and her son a tok

21:92.ar: إِنَّ هَٰذِهِ أُمَّتُكُمْ أُمَّةً وَاحِدَةً وَأَنَا رَبُّكُمْ فَاعْبُدُونِ
21:92.en: Lo! this, your religion, is one religion, and I am your Lord, so worship Me.

21:93.ar: وَتَقَطَّعُوا أَمْرَهُمْ بَيْنَهُمْ ۖ كُلٌّ إِلَيْنَا رَاجِعُونَ
21:93.en: And they have broken their religion (into fragments) among them, (yet) all are returning unto Us.

21:94.ar: فَمَنْ يَعْمَلْ مِنَ الصَّالِحَاتِ وَهُوَ مُؤْمِنٌ فَلَا كُفْرَانَ لِسَعْيِهِ وَإِنَّا لَه
21:94.en: Then whoso doeth some good works and is a believer, there will be no rejection of his effort. Lo! We record (i

21:95.ar: وَحَرَامٌ عَلَىٰ قَرْيَةٍ أَهْلَكْنَاهَا أَنَّهُمْ لَا يَرْجِعُونَ
21:95.en: And there is a ban upon any community which We have destroyed: that they shall not return.

21:96.ar: حَتَّىٰ إِذَا فُتِحَتْ يَأْجُوجُ وَمَأْجُوجُ وَهُمْ مِنْ كُلِّ حَدَبٍ يَنْسِلُونَ
21:96.en: Until, when Gog and Magog are let loose, and they hasten out of every mound,

21:97.ar: وَاقْتَرَبَ الْوَعْدُ الْحَقُّ فَإِذَا هِيَ شَاخِصَةٌ أَبْصَارُ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا يَا وَي
21:97.en: And the True Promise draweth nigh; then behold them, staring wide (in terror), the eyes of those who disbeliev

21:98.ar: إِنَّكُمْ وَمَا تَعْبُدُونَ مِنْ دُونِ اللَّهِ حَصَبُ جَهَنَّمَ أَنْتُمْ لَهَا وَارِدُونَ
21:98.en: Lo! ye (idolaters) and that which ye worship beside Allah are fuel of hell. Thereunto ye will come.

21:99.ar: لَوْ كَانَ هَٰؤُلَاءِ آلِهَةً مَا وَرَدُوهَا ۖ وَكُلٌّ فِيهَا خَالِدُونَ
21:99.en: If these had been gods they would not have come thither, but all will abide therein.

21:100.ar: لَهُمْ فِيهَا زَفِيرٌ وَهُمْ فِيهَا لَا يَسْمَعُونَ
21:100.en: Therein wailing is their portion, and therein they hear not.

21:101.ar: إِنَّ الَّذِينَ سَبَقَتْ لَهُمْ مِنَّا الْحُسْنَىٰ أُولَٰئِكَ عَنْهَا مُبْعَدُونَ
21:101.en: Lo! those unto whom kindness hath gone forth before from Us, they will be far removed from thence.

21:102.ar: لَا يَسْمَعُونَ حَسِيسَهَا ۖ وَهُمْ فِي مَا اشْتَهَتْ أَنْفُسُهُمْ خَالِدُونَ
21:102.en: They will not hear the slightest sound thereof, while they abide in that which their souls desire.

21:103.ar: لَا يَحْزُنُهُمُ الْفَزَعُ الْأَكْبَرُ وَتَتَلَقَّاهُمُ الْمَلَائِكَةُ هَٰذَا يَوْمُكُمُ ا
21:103.en: The Supreme Horror will not grieve them, and the angels will welcome them, (saying): This is your Day which ye

21:104.ar: يَوْمَ نَطْوِي السَّمَاءَ كَطَيِّ السِّجِلِّ لِلْكُتُبِ ۚ كَمَا بَدَأْنَا أَوَّلَ خَلْقٍ ن
21:104.en: The Day when We shall roll up the heavens as a recorder rolleth up a written scroll. As We began the first cre

21:105.ar: وَلَقَدْ كَتَبْنَا فِي الزَّبُورِ مِنْ بَعْدِ الذِّكْرِ أَنَّ الْأَرْضَ يَرِثُهَا عِبَادِي
21:105.en: And verily we have written in the Scripture, after the Reminder: My righteous slaves will inherit the earth:

21:106.ar: إِنَّ فِي هَٰذَا لَبَلَاغًا لِقَوْمٍ عَابِدِينَ
21:106.en: Lo! there is a plain statement for folk who are devout.

21:107.en: We sent thee not save as a mercy for the peoples.

21:108.ar: قُلْ إِنَّمَا يُوحَىٰ إِلَيَّ أَنَّمَا إِلَٰهُكُمْ إِلَٰهٌ وَاحِدٌ ۖ فَهَلْ أَنْتُمْ مُسْل
21:108.en: Say: It is only inspired in me that your Allah is One Allah. Will ye then surrender (unto Him)?

21:109.ar: فَإِنْ تَوَلَّوْا فَقُلْ آذَنْتُكُمْ عَلَىٰ سَوَاءٍ ۖ وَإِنْ أَدْرِي أَقَرِيبٌ أَمْ بَعِيد
21:109.en: But if they are averse, then say: I have warned you all alike, although I know not whether nigh or far is that

21:110.ar: إِنَّهُ يَعْلَمُ الْجَهْرَ مِنَ الْقَوْلِ وَيَعْلَمُ مَا تَكْتُمُونَ
21:110.en: Lo! He knoweth that which is said openly, and that which ye conceal.

21:111.ar: وَإِنْ أَدْرِي لَعَلَّهُ فِتْنَةٌ لَكُمْ وَمَتَاعٌ إِلَىٰ حِينٍ
21:111.en: And I know not but that this may be a trial for you, and enjoyment for a while.

21:112.ar: قَالَ رَبِّ احْكُمْ بِالْحَقِّ ۗ وَرَبُّنَا الرَّحْمَٰنُ الْمُسْتَعَانُ عَلَىٰ مَا تَصِفُو
21:112.en: He saith: My Lord! Judge Thou with truth. Our Lord is the Beneficent, Whose help is to be implored against tha

23:1.ar: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ قَدْ أَفْلَحَ الْمُؤْمِنُونَ

23:2.en: Who are humble in their prayers,

23:4.en: And who are payers of the poor-due;

23:6.ar: إِلَّا عَلَىٰ أَزْوَاجِهِمْ أَوْ مَا مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَانُهُمْ فَإِنَّهُمْ غَيْرُ مَلُومِينَ
23:6.en: Save from their wives or the (slaves) that their right hands possess, for then they are not blameworthy,

23:7.ar: فَمَنِ ابْتَغَىٰ وَرَاءَ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُولَٰئِكَ هُمُ الْعَادُونَ
23:7.en: But whoso craveth beyond that, such are transgressors -

23:8.en: And who are shepherds of their pledge and their covenant,

23:9.en: And who pay heed to their prayers.

23:11.ar: الَّذِينَ يَرِثُونَ الْفِرْدَوْسَ هُمْ فِيهَا خَالِدُونَ
23:11.en: Who will inherit paradise. There they will abide.

23:12.ar: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنْسَانَ مِنْ سُلَالَةٍ مِنْ طِينٍ
23:12.en: Verily We created man from a product of wet earth;

23:13.ar: ثُمَّ جَعَلْنَاهُ نُطْفَةً فِي قَرَارٍ مَكِينٍ
23:13.en: Then placed him as a drop (of seed) in a safe lodging;

23:14.ar: ثُمَّ خَلَقْنَا النُّطْفَةَ عَلَقَةً فَخَلَقْنَا الْعَلَقَةَ مُضْغَةً فَخَلَقْنَا الْمُضْغ
23:14.en: Then fashioned We the drop a clot, then fashioned We the clot a little lump, then fashioned We the little lump

23:15.en: Then lo! after that ye surely die.

23:16.en: Then lo! on the Day of Resurrection ye are raised (again).

23:17.ar: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا فَوْقَكُمْ سَبْعَ طَرَائِقَ وَمَا كُنَّا عَنِ الْخَلْقِ غَافِلِينَ
23:17.en: And We have created above you seven paths, and We are never unmindful of creation.

23:18.ar: وَأَنْزَلْنَا مِنَ السَّمَاءِ مَاءً بِقَدَرٍ فَأَسْكَنَّاهُ فِي الْأَرْضِ ۖ وَإِنَّا عَلَى
23:18.en: And we send down from the sky water in measure, and We give it lodging in the earth, and lo! We are Able to wi

23:19.ar: فَأَنْشَأْنَا لَكُمْ بِهِ جَنَّاتٍ مِنْ نَخِيلٍ وَأَعْنَابٍ لَكُمْ فِيهَا فَوَاكِهُ كَثِير
23:19.en: Then We produce for you therewith gardens of date-palms and grapes, wherein is much fruit for you and whereof

23:20.ar: وَشَجَرَةً تَخْرُجُ مِنْ طُورِ سَيْنَاءَ تَنْبُتُ بِالدُّهْنِ وَصِبْغٍ لِلْآكِلِينَ
23:20.en: And a tree that springeth forth from Mount Sinai that groweth oil and relish for the eaters.

23:21.ar: وَإِنَّ لَكُمْ فِي الْأَنْعَامِ لَعِبْرَةً ۖ نُسْقِيكُمْ مِمَّا فِي بُطُونِهَا وَلَكُمْ فِ
23:21.en: And lo! in the cattle there is verily a lesson for you. We give you to drink of that which is in their bellies

23:22.en: And on them and on the ship ye are carried.

23:23.ar: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِ فَقَالَ يَا قَوْمِ اعْبُدُوا اللَّهَ مَا لَكُم
23:23.en: And We verily sent Noah unto his folk, and he said: O my people! Serve Allah. Ye have no other Allah save Him.

23:24.ar: فَقَالَ الْمَلَأُ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا مِنْ قَوْمِهِ مَا هَٰذَا إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِثْلُكُمْ يُر
23:24.en: But the chieftains of his folk, who disbelieved, said: This is only a mortal like you who would make himself s

23:25.ar: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا رَجُلٌ بِهِ جِنَّةٌ فَتَرَبَّصُوا بِهِ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍ
23:25.en: He is only a man in whom is a madness, so watch him for a while.

23:26.en: He said: My Lord! Help me because they deny me.

23:27.ar: فَأَوْحَيْنَا إِلَيْهِ أَنِ اصْنَعِ الْفُلْكَ بِأَعْيُنِنَا وَوَحْيِنَا فَإِذَا جَاءَ أَمْ
23:27.en: Then We inspired in him, saying: Make the ship under Our eyes and Our inspiration. Then, when Our command come

23:28.ar: فَإِذَا اسْتَوَيْتَ أَنْتَ وَمَنْ مَعَكَ عَلَى الْفُلْكِ فَقُلِ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي
23:28.en: And when thou art on board the ship, thou and whoso is with thee, then say: Praise be to Allah Who hath saved

23:29.ar: وَقُلْ رَبِّ أَنْزِلْنِي مُنْزَلًا مُبَارَكًا وَأَنْتَ خَيْرُ الْمُنْزِلِينَ
23:29.en: And say: My Lord! Cause me to land at a blessed landing-place, for Thou art Best of all who bring to land.

23:30.ar: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَاتٍ وَإِنْ كُنَّا لَمُبْتَلِينَ
23:30.en: Lo! herein verily are portents, for lo! We are ever putting (mankind) to the test.

23:31.ar: ثُمَّ أَنْشَأْنَا مِنْ بَعْدِهِمْ قَرْنًا آخَرِينَ
23:31.en: Then, after them, We brought forth another generation;

23:32.ar: فَأَرْسَلْنَا فِيهِمْ رَسُولًا مِنْهُمْ أَنِ اعْبُدُوا اللَّهَ مَا لَكُمْ مِنْ إِلَٰهٍ غَي
23:32.en: And we sent among them a messenger of their own, saying: Serve Allah, Ye have no other Allah save Him. Will ye

23:33.ar: وَقَالَ الْمَلَأُ مِنْ قَوْمِهِ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا وَكَذَّبُوا بِلِقَاءِ الْآخِرَةِ وَأَتْ
23:33.en: And the chieftains of his folk, who disbelieved and denied the meeting of the Hereafter, and whom We had made

23:34.ar: وَلَئِنْ أَطَعْتُمْ بَشَرًا مِثْلَكُمْ إِنَّكُمْ إِذًا لَخَاسِرُونَ
23:34.en: If ye were to obey a mortal like yourselves, then, lo! ye surely would be losers.

23:35.ar: أَيَعِدُكُمْ أَنَّكُمْ إِذَا مِتُّمْ وَكُنْتُمْ تُرَابًا وَعِظَامًا أَنَّكُمْ مُخْرَجُونَ
23:35.en: Doth he promise you that you, when ye are dead and have become dust and bones, will (again) be brought forth?

23:36.en: Begone, begone, with that which ye are promised!

23:37.ar: إِنْ هِيَ إِلَّا حَيَاتُنَا الدُّنْيَا نَمُوتُ وَنَحْيَا وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَبْعُوثِينَ
23:37.en: There is naught but our life of the world; we die and we live, and we shall not be raised (again).

23:38.ar: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا رَجُلٌ افْتَرَىٰ عَلَى اللَّهِ كَذِبًا وَمَا نَحْنُ لَهُ بِمُؤْمِنِينَ
23:38.en: He is only a man who hath invented a lie about Allah. We are not going to put faith in him.

23:39.en: He said: My Lord! Help me because they deny me.

23:40.en: He said: In a little while they surely will become repentant.

23:41.ar: فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ الصَّيْحَةُ بِالْحَقِّ فَجَعَلْنَاهُمْ غُثَاءً ۚ فَبُعْدًا لِلْقَوْمِ الظَّ
23:41.en: So the (Awful) Cry overtook them rightfully, and We made them like as wreckage (that a torrent hurleth). A far

23:42.ar: ثُمَّ أَنْشَأْنَا مِنْ بَعْدِهِمْ قُرُونًا آخَرِينَ
23:42.en: Then after them We brought forth other generations.

23:43.ar: مَا تَسْبِقُ مِنْ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلَهَا وَمَا يَسْتَأْخِرُونَ
23:43.en: No nation can outstrip its term, nor yet postpone it.

23:44.ar: ثُمَّ أَرْسَلْنَا رُسُلَنَا تَتْرَىٰ ۖ كُلَّ مَا جَاءَ أُمَّةً رَسُولُهَا كَذَّبُوهُ ۚ فَأ
23:44.en: Then We sent our messengers one after another. Whenever its messenger came unto a nation they denied him; so W

23:45.ar: ثُمَّ أَرْسَلْنَا مُوسَىٰ وَأَخَاهُ هَارُونَ بِآيَاتِنَا وَسُلْطَانٍ مُبِينٍ
23:45.en: Then We sent Moses and his brother Aaron with Our tokens and a clear warrant

23:46.ar: إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ وَمَلَئِهِ فَاسْتَكْبَرُوا وَكَانُوا قَوْمًا عَالِينَ
23:46.en: Unto Pharaoh and his chiefs, but they scorned (them) and they were despotic folk.

23:47.ar: فَقَالُوا أَنُؤْمِنُ لِبَشَرَيْنِ مِثْلِنَا وَقَوْمُهُمَا لَنَا عَابِدُونَ
23:47.en: And they said: Shall we put faith in two mortals like ourselves, and whose folk are servile unto us?

23:48.en: So they denied them, and became of those who were destroyed.

23:49.ar: وَلَقَدْ آتَيْنَا مُوسَى الْكِتَابَ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَهْتَدُونَ
23:49.en: And We verily gave Moses the Scripture, that haply they might go aright.

23:50.ar: وَجَعَلْنَا ابْنَ مَرْيَمَ وَأُمَّهُ آيَةً وَآوَيْنَاهُمَا إِلَىٰ رَبْوَةٍ ذَاتِ قَرَارٍ و
23:50.en: And We made the son of Mary and his mother a portent, and We gave them refuge on a height, a place of flocks a

23:51.ar: يَا أَيُّهَا الرُّسُلُ كُلُوا مِنَ الطَّيِّبَاتِ وَاعْمَلُوا صَالِحًا ۖ إِنِّي بِمَا تَعْم
23:51.en: O ye messengers! Eat of the good things, and do right. Lo! I am Aware of what ye do.

23:52.ar: وَإِنَّ هَٰذِهِ أُمَّتُكُمْ أُمَّةً وَاحِدَةً وَأَنَا رَبُّكُمْ فَاتَّقُونِ
23:52.en: And lo! this your religion is one religion and I am your Lord, so keep your duty unto Me.

23:53.ar: فَتَقَطَّعُوا أَمْرَهُمْ بَيْنَهُمْ زُبُرًا ۖ كُلُّ حِزْبٍ بِمَا لَدَيْهِمْ فَرِحُونَ
23:53.en: But they (mankind) have broken their religion among them into sects, each group rejoicing in its tenets.

23:54.en: So leave them in their error till a time.

23:55.ar: أَيَحْسَبُونَ أَنَّمَا نُمِدُّهُمْ بِهِ مِنْ مَالٍ وَبَنِينَ
23:55.en: Think they that in the wealth and sons wherewith We provide them

23:56.ar: نُسَارِعُ لَهُمْ فِي الْخَيْرَاتِ ۚ بَلْ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
23:56.en: We hasten unto them with good things? Nay, but they perceive not.

23:57.ar: إِنَّ الَّذِينَ هُمْ مِنْ خَشْيَةِ رَبِّهِمْ مُشْفِقُونَ
23:57.en: Lo! those who go in awe for fear of their Lord.

23:58.en: And those who believe in the revelations of their Lord,

23:59.en: And those who ascribe not partners unto their Lord,

23:60.ar: وَالَّذِينَ يُؤْتُونَ مَا آتَوْا وَقُلُوبُهُمْ وَجِلَةٌ أَنَّهُمْ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ رَاجِعُ
23:60.en: And those who give that which they give with hearts afraid because they are about to return unto their Lord,

23:61.ar: أُولَٰئِكَ يُسَارِعُونَ فِي الْخَيْرَاتِ وَهُمْ لَهَا سَابِقُونَ
23:61.en: These race for the good things, and they shall win them in the race.

23:62.ar: وَلَا نُكَلِّفُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَا ۖ وَلَدَيْنَا كِتَابٌ يَنْطِقُ بِالْحَقِّ ۚ وَهُم
23:62.en: And we task not any soul beyond its scope, and with Us is a Record which speaketh the truth, and they will not

23:63.ar: بَلْ قُلُوبُهُمْ فِي غَمْرَةٍ مِنْ هَٰذَا وَلَهُمْ أَعْمَالٌ مِنْ دُونِ ذَٰلِكَ هُمْ لَهَا
23:63.en: Nay, but their hearts are in ignorance of this (Qur'an), and they have other works, besides, which they are do

23:64.ar: حَتَّىٰ إِذَا أَخَذْنَا مُتْرَفِيهِمْ بِالْعَذَابِ إِذَا هُمْ يَجْأَرُونَ
23:64.en: Till when We grasp their luxurious ones with the punishment, behold! they supplicate.

23:65.ar: لَا تَجْأَرُوا الْيَوْمَ ۖ إِنَّكُمْ مِنَّا لَا تُنْصَرُونَ
23:65.en: Supplicate not this day! Assuredly ye will not be helped by Us.

23:66.ar: قَدْ كَانَتْ آيَاتِي تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْكُمْ فَكُنْتُمْ عَلَىٰ أَعْقَابِكُمْ تَنْكِصُونَ
23:66.en: My revelations were recited unto you, but ye used to turn back on your heels,

23:67.en: In scorn thereof. Nightly did ye rave together.

23:68.ar: أَفَلَمْ يَدَّبَّرُوا الْقَوْلَ أَمْ جَاءَهُمْ مَا لَمْ يَأْتِ آبَاءَهُمُ الْأَوَّلِينَ
23:68.en: Have they not pondered the Word, or hath that come unto them which came not unto their fathers of old?

23:69.ar: أَمْ لَمْ يَعْرِفُوا رَسُولَهُمْ فَهُمْ لَهُ مُنْكِرُونَ
23:69.en: Or know they not their messenger, and so reject him?

23:70.ar: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ بِهِ جِنَّةٌ ۚ بَلْ جَاءَهُمْ بِالْحَقِّ وَأَكْثَرُهُمْ لِلْحَقِّ كَارِهُو
23:70.en: Or say they: There is a madness in him? Nay, but he bringeth them the Truth; and most of them are haters of th

23:71.ar: وَلَوِ اتَّبَعَ الْحَقُّ أَهْوَاءَهُمْ لَفَسَدَتِ السَّمَاوَاتُ وَالْأَرْضُ وَمَنْ فِيهِنّ
23:71.en: And if the Truth had followed their desires, verily the heavens and the earth and whosoever is therein had bee

23:72.ar: أَمْ تَسْأَلُهُمْ خَرْجًا فَخَرَاجُ رَبِّكَ خَيْرٌ ۖ وَهُوَ خَيْرُ الرَّازِقِينَ
23:72.en: Or dost thou ask of them (O Muhammad) any tribute? But the bounty of thy Lord is better, for He is Best of all

23:73.en: And lo! thou summonest them indeed unto a straight path.

23:74.ar: وَإِنَّ الَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِالْآخِرَةِ عَنِ الصِّرَاطِ لَنَاكِبُونَ
23:74.en: And lo! those who believe not in the Hereafter are indeed astray from the path.

23:75.ar: ۞ وَلَوْ رَحِمْنَاهُمْ وَكَشَفْنَا مَا بِهِمْ مِنْ ضُرٍّ لَلَجُّوا فِي طُغْيَانِهِمْ يَعْم
23:75.en: Though We had mercy on them and relieved them of the harm afflicting them, they still would wander blindly on

23:76.ar: وَلَقَدْ أَخَذْنَاهُمْ بِالْعَذَابِ فَمَا اسْتَكَانُوا لِرَبِّهِمْ وَمَا يَتَضَرَّعُونَ
23:76.en: Already have We grasped them with punishment, but they humble not themselves unto their Lord, nor do they pray

23:77.ar: حَتَّىٰ إِذَا فَتَحْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ بَابًا ذَا عَذَابٍ شَدِيدٍ إِذَا هُمْ فِيهِ مُبْلِسُونَ
23:77.en: Until, when We open for them the gate of extreme punishment, behold! they are aghast thereat.

23:78.ar: وَهُوَ الَّذِي أَنْشَأَ لَكُمُ السَّمْعَ وَالْأَبْصَارَ وَالْأَفْئِدَةَ ۚ قَلِيلًا مَا تَش
23:78.en: He it is Who hath created for you ears and eyes and hearts. Small thanks give ye!

23:79.ar: وَهُوَ الَّذِي ذَرَأَكُمْ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَإِلَيْهِ تُحْشَرُونَ
23:79.en: And He it is Who hath sown you broadcast in the earth, and unto Him ye will be gathered.

23:80.ar: وَهُوَ الَّذِي يُحْيِي وَيُمِيتُ وَلَهُ اخْتِلَافُ اللَّيْلِ وَالنَّهَارِ ۚ أَفَلَا تَعْقِ
23:80.en: And He it is Who giveth life and causeth death, and His is the difference of night and day. Have ye then no se

23:81.ar: بَلْ قَالُوا مِثْلَ مَا قَالَ الْأَوَّلُونَ
23:81.en: Nay, but they say the like of that which said the men of old;

23:82.ar: قَالُوا أَإِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظَامًا أَإِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ
23:82.en: They say: When we are dead and have become (mere) dust and bones, shall we then, forsooth, be raised again?

23:83.ar: لَقَدْ وُعِدْنَا نَحْنُ وَآبَاؤُنَا هَٰذَا مِنْ قَبْلُ إِنْ هَٰذَا إِلَّا أَسَاطِيرُ الْأَ
23:83.en: We were already promised this, we and our forefathers. Lo! this is naught but fables of the men of old.

23:84.ar: قُلْ لِمَنِ الْأَرْضُ وَمَنْ فِيهَا إِنْ كُنْتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
23:84.en: Say: Unto Whom (belongeth) the earth and whosoever is therein, if ye have knowledge?

23:85.en: They will say: Unto Allah. Say: Will ye not then remember?

23:86.ar: قُلْ مَنْ رَبُّ السَّمَاوَاتِ السَّبْعِ وَرَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ
23:86.en: Say: Who is Lord of the seven heavens, and Lord of the Tremendous Throne?

23:87.en: They will say: Unto Allah (all that belongeth). Say: Will ye not then keep duty (unto Him)?

23:88.ar: قُلْ مَنْ بِيَدِهِ مَلَكُوتُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَهُوَ يُجِيرُ وَلَا يُجَارُ عَلَيْهِ إِنْ كُنْت
23:88.en: Say: In Whose hand is the dominion over all things and He protecteth, while against Him there is no protection

23:89.en: They will say: Unto Allah (all that belongeth). Say: How then are ye bewitched?

23:90.en: Nay, but We have brought them the Truth, and lo! they are liars.

23:91.ar: مَا اتَّخَذَ اللَّهُ مِنْ وَلَدٍ وَمَا كَانَ مَعَهُ مِنْ إِلَٰهٍ ۚ إِذًا لَذَهَبَ كُلُّ إِ
23:91.en: Allah hath not chosen any son, nor is there any god along with Him; else would each god have assuredly champio

23:92.ar: عَالِمِ الْغَيْبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ فَتَعَالَىٰ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
23:92.en: Knower of the Invisible and the Visible! and Exalted be He over all that they ascribe as partners (unto Him)!

23:93.ar: قُلْ رَبِّ إِمَّا تُرِيَنِّي مَا يُوعَدُونَ
23:93.en: Say: My Lord! If Thou shouldst show me that which they are promised.

23:94.ar: رَبِّ فَلَا تَجْعَلْنِي فِي الْقَوْمِ الظَّالِمِينَ
23:94.en: My Lord! then set me not among the wrongdoing folk.

23:95.ar: وَإِنَّا عَلَىٰ أَنْ نُرِيَكَ مَا نَعِدُهُمْ لَقَادِرُونَ
23:95.en: And verily We are Able to show thee that which We have promised them.

23:96.ar: ادْفَعْ بِالَّتِي هِيَ أَحْسَنُ السَّيِّئَةَ ۚ نَحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَصِفُونَ
23:96.en: Repel evil with that which is better. We are Best Aware of that which they allege.

23:97.ar: وَقُلْ رَبِّ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ هَمَزَاتِ الشَّيَاطِينِ
23:97.en: And say: My Lord! I seek refuge in Thee from suggestions of the evil ones,

23:98.en: And I seek refuge in Thee, my Lord, lest they be present with me,

23:99.ar: حَتَّىٰ إِذَا جَاءَ أَحَدَهُمُ الْمَوْتُ قَالَ رَبِّ ارْجِعُونِ
23:99.en: Until, when death cometh unto one of them, he saith: My Lord! Send me back,

23:100.ar: لَعَلِّي أَعْمَلُ صَالِحًا فِيمَا تَرَكْتُ ۚ كَلَّا ۚ إِنَّهَا كَلِمَةٌ هُوَ قَائِلُهَا ۖ
23:100.en: That I may do right in that which I have left behind! But nay! It is but a word that he speaketh; and behind t

23:101.ar: فَإِذَا نُفِخَ فِي الصُّورِ فَلَا أَنْسَابَ بَيْنَهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ وَلَا يَتَسَاءَلُونَ
23:101.en: And when the trumpet is blown there will be no kinship among them that day, nor will they ask of one another.

23:102.ar: فَمَنْ ثَقُلَتْ مَوَازِينُهُ فَأُولَٰئِكَ هُمُ الْمُفْلِحُونَ
23:102.en: Then those whose scales are heavy, they are the successful.

23:103.ar: وَمَنْ خَفَّتْ مَوَازِينُهُ فَأُولَٰئِكَ الَّذِينَ خَسِرُوا أَنْفُسَهُمْ فِي جَهَنَّمَ خَا
23:103.en: And those whose scales are light are those who lose their souls, in hell abiding.

23:104.ar: تَلْفَحُ وُجُوهَهُمُ النَّارُ وَهُمْ فِيهَا كَالِحُونَ
23:104.en: The fire burneth their faces, and they are glum therein.

23:105.ar: أَلَمْ تَكُنْ آيَاتِي تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْكُمْ فَكُنْتُمْ بِهَا تُكَذِّبُونَ
23:105.en: (It will be said): Were not My revelations recited unto you, and then ye used to deny them?

23:106.ar: قَالُوا رَبَّنَا غَلَبَتْ عَلَيْنَا شِقْوَتُنَا وَكُنَّا قَوْمًا ضَالِّينَ
23:106.en: They will say: Our Lord! Our evil fortune conquered us, and we were erring folk.

23:107.ar: رَبَّنَا أَخْرِجْنَا مِنْهَا فَإِنْ عُدْنَا فَإِنَّا ظَالِمُونَ
23:107.en: Our Lord! Oh, bring us forth from hence! If we return (to evil) then indeed we shall be wrong-doers.

23:108.en: He saith: Begone therein, and speak not unto Me.

23:109.ar: إِنَّهُ كَانَ فَرِيقٌ مِنْ عِبَادِي يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا آمَنَّا فَاغْفِرْ لَنَا وَارْحَمْن
23:109.en: Lo! there was a party of My slaves who said: Our Lord! We believe, therefor forgive us and have mercy on us fo

23:110.ar: فَاتَّخَذْتُمُوهُمْ سِخْرِيًّا حَتَّىٰ أَنْسَوْكُمْ ذِكْرِي وَكُنْتُمْ مِنْهُمْ تَضْحَكُون
23:110.en: But ye chose them for a laughing-stock until they caused you to forget remembrance of Me, while ye laughed at

23:111.ar: إِنِّي جَزَيْتُهُمُ الْيَوْمَ بِمَا صَبَرُوا أَنَّهُمْ هُمُ الْفَائِزُونَ
23:111.en: Lo! I have rewarded them this day forasmuch as they were steadfast in that they, even they, are the triumphant

23:112.ar: قَالَ كَمْ لَبِثْتُمْ فِي الْأَرْضِ عَدَدَ سِنِينَ
23:112.en: He will say: How long tarried ye in the earth, counting by years?

23:113.ar: قَالُوا لَبِثْنَا يَوْمًا أَوْ بَعْضَ يَوْمٍ فَاسْأَلِ الْعَادِّينَ
23:113.en: They will say: We tarried by a day or part of a day. Ask of those who keep count!

23:114.ar: قَالَ إِنْ لَبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا قَلِيلًا ۖ لَوْ أَنَّكُمْ كُنْتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
23:114.en: He will say: Ye tarried but a little if ye only knew.

23:115.ar: أَفَحَسِبْتُمْ أَنَّمَا خَلَقْنَاكُمْ عَبَثًا وَأَنَّكُمْ إِلَيْنَا لَا تُرْجَعُونَ
23:115.en: Deemed ye then that We had created you for naught, and that ye would not be returned unto Us?

23:116.ar: فَتَعَالَى اللَّهُ الْمَلِكُ الْحَقُّ ۖ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْكَرِيمِ
23:116.en: Now Allah be Exalted, the True King! There is no Allah save Him, the Lord of the Throne of Grace.

23:117.ar: وَمَنْ يَدْعُ مَعَ اللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا آخَرَ لَا بُرْهَانَ لَهُ بِهِ فَإِنَّمَا حِسَابُهُ عِن
23:117.en: He who crieth unto any other god along with Allah hath no proof thereof. His reckoning is only with his Lord.

23:118.ar: وَقُلْ رَبِّ اغْفِرْ وَارْحَمْ وَأَنْتَ خَيْرُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
23:118.en: And (O Muhammad) say: My Lord! Forgive and have mercy, for Thou art Best of all who show mercy.

26:2.en: These are revelations of the Scripture that maketh plain.

26:3.ar: لَعَلَّكَ بَاخِعٌ نَفْسَكَ أَلَّا يَكُونُوا مُؤْمِنِينَ
26:3.en: It may be that thou tormentest thyself (O Muhammad) because they believe not.

26:4.ar: إِنْ نَشَأْ نُنَزِّلْ عَلَيْهِمْ مِنَ السَّمَاءِ آيَةً فَظَلَّتْ أَعْنَاقُهُمْ لَهَا خَاضِ
26:4.en: If We will, We can send down on them from the sky a portent so that their necks would remain bowed before it.

26:5.ar: وَمَا يَأْتِيهِمْ مِنْ ذِكْرٍ مِنَ الرَّحْمَٰنِ مُحْدَثٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا عَنْهُ مُعْرِضِينَ
26:5.en: Never cometh there unto them a fresh reminder from the Beneficent One, but they turn away from it.

26:6.ar: فَقَدْ كَذَّبُوا فَسَيَأْتِيهِمْ أَنْبَاءُ مَا كَانُوا بِهِ يَسْتَهْزِئُونَ
26:6.en: Now they have denied (the Truth); but there will come unto them tidings of that whereat they used to scoff.

26:7.ar: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا إِلَى الْأَرْضِ كَمْ أَنْبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِنْ كُلِّ زَوْجٍ كَرِيمٍ
26:7.en: Have they not seen the earth, how much of every fruitful kind We make to grow therein?

26:8.ar: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُمْ مُؤْمِنِينَ
26:8.en: Lo! herein is indeed a portent; yet most of them are not believers.

26:9.en: And lo! thy Lord! He is indeed the Mighty, the Merciful.

26:10.ar: وَإِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبُّكَ مُوسَىٰ أَنِ ائْتِ الْقَوْمَ الظَّالِمِينَ
26:10.en: And when thy Lord called Moses, saying: Go unto the wrongdoing folk,

26:11.en: The folk of Pharaoh. Will they not ward off (evil)?

26:12.ar: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّي أَخَافُ أَنْ يُكَذِّبُونِ
26:12.en: He said: My Lord! Lo! I fear that they will deny me,

26:13.ar: وَيَضِيقُ صَدْرِي وَلَا يَنْطَلِقُ لِسَانِي فَأَرْسِلْ إِلَىٰ هَارُونَ
26:13.en: And I shall be embarrassed, and my tongue will not speak plainly, therefor send for Aaron (to help me).

26:14.ar: وَلَهُمْ عَلَيَّ ذَنْبٌ فَأَخَافُ أَنْ يَقْتُلُونِ
26:14.en: And they have a crime against me, so I fear that they will kill me.

26:15.ar: قَالَ كَلَّا ۖ فَاذْهَبَا بِآيَاتِنَا ۖ إِنَّا مَعَكُمْ مُسْتَمِعُونَ
26:15.en: He said: Nay, verily. So go ye twain with Our tokens. Lo! We shall be with you, Hearing.

26:16.ar: فَأْتِيَا فِرْعَوْنَ فَقُولَا إِنَّا رَسُولُ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
26:16.en: And come together unto Pharaoh and say: Lo! we bear a message of the Lord of the Worlds,

26:17.en: (Saying): Let the Children of Israel go with us.

26:18.ar: قَالَ أَلَمْ نُرَبِّكَ فِينَا وَلِيدًا وَلَبِثْتَ فِينَا مِنْ عُمُرِكَ سِنِينَ
26:18.en: (Pharaoh) said (unto Moses): Did we not rear thee among us as a child? And thou didst dwell many years of thy

26:19.ar: وَفَعَلْتَ فَعْلَتَكَ الَّتِي فَعَلْتَ وَأَنْتَ مِنَ الْكَافِرِينَ
26:19.en: And thou didst that thy deed which thou didst, and thou wast one of the ingrates.

26:20.ar: قَالَ فَعَلْتُهَا إِذًا وَأَنَا مِنَ الضَّالِّينَ
26:20.en: He said: I did it then, when I was of those who are astray.

26:21.ar: فَفَرَرْتُ مِنْكُمْ لَمَّا خِفْتُكُمْ فَوَهَبَ لِي رَبِّي حُكْمًا وَجَعَلَنِي مِنَ الْمُرْ
26:21.en: Then I fled from you when I feared you, and my Lord vouchsafed me a command and appointed me (of the number) o

26:22.ar: وَتِلْكَ نِعْمَةٌ تَمُنُّهَا عَلَيَّ أَنْ عَبَّدْتَ بَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ
26:22.en: And this is the past favour wherewith thou reproachest me: that thou hast enslaved the Children of Israel.

26:23.en: Pharaoh said: And what is the Lord of the Worlds?

26:24.ar: قَالَ رَبُّ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا ۖ إِنْ كُنْتُمْ مُوقِنِينَ
26:24.en: (Moses) said: Lord of the heavens and the earth and all that is between them, if ye had but sure belief.

26:25.en: (Pharaoh) said unto those around him: Hear ye not?

26:26.en: He said: Your Lord and the Lord of your fathers.

26:27.ar: قَالَ إِنَّ رَسُولَكُمُ الَّذِي أُرْسِلَ إِلَيْكُمْ لَمَجْنُونٌ
26:27.en: (Pharaoh) said: Lo! your messenger who hath been sent unto you is indeed a madman!

26:28.ar: قَالَ رَبُّ الْمَشْرِقِ وَالْمَغْرِبِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا ۖ إِنْ كُنْتُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ
26:28.en: He said: Lord of the East and the West and all that is between them, if ye did but understand.

26:29.ar: قَالَ لَئِنِ اتَّخَذْتَ إِلَٰهًا غَيْرِي لَأَجْعَلَنَّكَ مِنَ الْمَسْجُونِينَ
26:29.en: (Pharaoh) said: If thou choosest a god other than me, I assuredly shall place thee among the prisoners.

26:30.en: He said: Even though I show thee something plain?

26:31.ar: قَالَ فَأْتِ بِهِ إِنْ كُنْتَ مِنَ الصَّادِقِينَ
26:31.en: (Pharaoh) said: Produce it then, if thou art of the truthful!

26:32.ar: فَأَلْقَىٰ عَصَاهُ فَإِذَا هِيَ ثُعْبَانٌ مُبِينٌ
26:32.en: Then he flung down his staff and it became a serpent manifest,

26:33.ar: وَنَزَعَ يَدَهُ فَإِذَا هِيَ بَيْضَاءُ لِلنَّاظِرِينَ
26:33.en: And he drew forth his hand and lo! it was white to the beholders.

26:34.ar: قَالَ لِلْمَلَإِ حَوْلَهُ إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَسَاحِرٌ عَلِيمٌ
26:34.en: (Pharaoh) said unto the chiefs about him: Lo! this is verily a knowing wizard,

26:35.ar: يُرِيدُ أَنْ يُخْرِجَكُمْ مِنْ أَرْضِكُمْ بِسِحْرِهِ فَمَاذَا تَأْمُرُونَ
26:35.en: Who would drive you out of your land by his magic. Now what counsel ye?

26:36.ar: قَالُوا أَرْجِهْ وَأَخَاهُ وَابْعَثْ فِي الْمَدَائِنِ حَاشِرِينَ
26:36.en: They said: Put him off, (him) and his brother, and send into the cities summoners

26:37.en: Who shall bring unto thee every knowing wizard.

26:38.en: So the wizards were gathered together at a set time on a day appointed.

26:39.en: And it was said unto the people: Are ye (also) gathering?

26:40.ar: لَعَلَّنَا نَتَّبِعُ السَّحَرَةَ إِنْ كَانُوا هُمُ الْغَالِبِينَ
26:40.en: (They said): Aye, so that we may follow the wizards if they are the winners.

26:41.ar: فَلَمَّا جَاءَ السَّحَرَةُ قَالُوا لِفِرْعَوْنَ أَئِنَّ لَنَا لَأَجْرًا إِنْ كُنَّا نَحْنُ
26:41.en: And when the wizards came they said unto Pharaoh: Will there surely be a reward for us if we are the winners?

26:42.ar: قَالَ نَعَمْ وَإِنَّكُمْ إِذًا لَمِنَ الْمُقَرَّبِينَ
26:42.en: He said: Aye, and ye will then surely be of those brought near (to me).

26:43.ar: قَالَ لَهُمْ مُوسَىٰ أَلْقُوا مَا أَنْتُمْ مُلْقُونَ
26:43.en: Moses said unto them: Throw what ye are going to throw!

26:44.ar: فَأَلْقَوْا حِبَالَهُمْ وَعِصِيَّهُمْ وَقَالُوا بِعِزَّةِ فِرْعَوْنَ إِنَّا لَنَحْنُ الْغَ
26:44.en: Then they threw down their cords and their staves and said: By Pharaoh's might, lo! we verily are the winners.

26:45.ar: فَأَلْقَىٰ مُوسَىٰ عَصَاهُ فَإِذَا هِيَ تَلْقَفُ مَا يَأْفِكُونَ
26:45.en: Then Moses threw his staff and lo! it swallowed that which they did falsely show.

26:46.en: And the wizards were flung prostrate,

26:47.en: Crying: We believe in the Lord of the Worlds,

26:48.en: The Lord of Moses and Aaron.

26:49.ar: قَالَ آمَنْتُمْ لَهُ قَبْلَ أَنْ آذَنَ لَكُمْ ۖ إِنَّهُ لَكَبِيرُكُمُ الَّذِي عَلَّمَكُمُ
26:49.en: (Pharaoh) said: Ye put your faith in him before I give you leave. Lo! he doubtless is your chief who taught yo

26:50.ar: قَالُوا لَا ضَيْرَ ۖ إِنَّا إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا مُنْقَلِبُونَ
26:50.en: They said: It is no hurt, for lo! unto our Lord we shall return.

26:51.ar: إِنَّا نَطْمَعُ أَنْ يَغْفِرَ لَنَا رَبُّنَا خَطَايَانَا أَنْ كُنَّا أَوَّلَ الْمُؤْمِنِين
26:51.en: Lo! we ardently hope that our Lord will forgive us our sins because we are the first of the believers.

26:52.ar: ۞ وَأَوْحَيْنَا إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰ أَنْ أَسْرِ بِعِبَادِي إِنَّكُمْ مُتَّبَعُونَ
26:52.en: And We inspired Moses, saying: Take away My slaves by night, for ye will be pursued.

26:53.en: Then Pharaoh sent into the cities summoners,

26:54.en: (Who said): Lo! these indeed are but a little troop,

26:55.en: And lo! they are offenders against us.

26:56.en: And lo! we are a ready host.

26:57.en: Thus did We take them away from gardens and watersprings,

26:58.en: And treasures and a fair estate.

26:59.en: Thus (were those things taken from them) and We caused the Children of Israel to inherit them.

26:60.en: And they overtook them at sunrise.

26:61.ar: فَلَمَّا تَرَاءَى الْجَمْعَانِ قَالَ أَصْحَابُ مُوسَىٰ إِنَّا لَمُدْرَكُونَ
26:61.en: And when the two hosts saw each other, those with Moses said: Lo! we are indeed caught.

26:62.ar: قَالَ كَلَّا ۖ إِنَّ مَعِيَ رَبِّي سَيَهْدِينِ
26:62.en: He said: Nay, verily! for lo! my Lord is with me. He will guide me.

26:63.ar: فَأَوْحَيْنَا إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰ أَنِ اضْرِبْ بِعَصَاكَ الْبَحْرَ ۖ فَانْفَلَقَ فَكَانَ كُلُّ
26:63.en: Then We inspired Moses, saying: Smite the sea with thy staff. And it parted, and each part was as a mountain v

26:64.en: Then brought We near the others to that place.

26:65.en: And We saved Moses and those with him, every one;

26:67.ar: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُمْ مُؤْمِنِينَ
26:67.en: Lo! herein is indeed a portent, yet most of them are not believers.

26:68.en: And lo, thy Lord! He is indeed the Mighty, the Merciful.

26:69.en: Recite unto them the story of Abraham:

26:70.ar: إِذْ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ وَقَوْمِهِ مَا تَعْبُدُونَ
26:70.en: When he said unto his father and his folk: What worship ye?

26:71.ar: قَالُوا نَعْبُدُ أَصْنَامًا فَنَظَلُّ لَهَا عَاكِفِينَ
26:71.en: They said: We worship idols, and are ever devoted unto them.

26:72.en: He said: Do they hear you when ye cry?

26:73.en: Or do they benefit or harm you?

26:74.ar: قَالُوا بَلْ وَجَدْنَا آبَاءَنَا كَذَٰلِكَ يَفْعَلُونَ
26:74.en: They said: Nay, but we found our fathers acting on this wise.

26:75.en: He said: See now that which ye worship,

26:77.ar: فَإِنَّهُمْ عَدُوٌّ لِي إِلَّا رَبَّ الْعَالَمِينَ
26:77.en: Lo! they are (all) an enemy unto me, save the Lord of the Worlds,

26:78.en: Who created me, and He doth guide me,

26:79.en: And Who feedeth me and watereth me.

26:80.en: And when I sicken, then He healeth me,

26:81.en: And Who causeth me to die, then giveth me life (again),

26:82.ar: وَالَّذِي أَطْمَعُ أَنْ يَغْفِرَ لِي خَطِيئَتِي يَوْمَ الدِّينِ
26:82.en: And Who, I ardently hope, will forgive me my sin on the Day of Judgment.

26:83.ar: رَبِّ هَبْ لِي حُكْمًا وَأَلْحِقْنِي بِالصَّالِحِينَ
26:83.en: My Lord! Vouchsafe me wisdom and unite me to the righteous.

26:84.ar: وَاجْعَلْ لِي لِسَانَ صِدْقٍ فِي الْآخِرِينَ
26:84.en: And give unto me a good report in later generations.

26:85.en: And place me among the inheritors of the Garden of Delight,

26:86.ar: وَاغْفِرْ لِأَبِي إِنَّهُ كَانَ مِنَ الضَّالِّينَ
26:86.en: And forgive my father. Lo! he is of those who err.

26:87.en: And abase me not on the day when they are raised,

26:88.ar: يَوْمَ لَا يَنْفَعُ مَالٌ وَلَا بَنُونَ
26:88.en: The day when wealth and sons avail not (any man)

26:89.ar: إِلَّا مَنْ أَتَى اللَّهَ بِقَلْبٍ سَلِيمٍ
26:89.en: Save him who bringeth unto Allah a whole heart.

26:90.en: And the Garden will be brought nigh for those who ward off (evil).

26:91.en: And hell will appear plainly to the erring.

26:92.ar: وَقِيلَ لَهُمْ أَيْنَ مَا كُنْتُمْ تَعْبُدُونَ
26:92.en: And it will be said unto them: Where is (all) that ye used to worship

26:93.ar: مِنْ دُونِ اللَّهِ هَلْ يَنْصُرُونَكُمْ أَوْ يَنْتَصِرُونَ
26:93.en: Instead of Allah? Can they help you or help themselves?

26:94.en: Then will they be hurled therein, they and the seducers

26:95.en: And the hosts of Iblis, together.

26:96.en: And they will say, when they are quarrelling therein:

26:97.ar: تَاللَّهِ إِنْ كُنَّا لَفِي ضَلَالٍ مُبِينٍ
26:97.en: By Allah, of a truth we were in error manifest

26:98.en: When we made you equal with the Lord of the Worlds.

26:99.en: It was but the guilty who misled us.

26:102.ar: فَلَوْ أَنَّ لَنَا كَرَّةً فَنَكُونَ مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ
26:102.en: Oh, that we had another turn (on earth), that we might be of the believers!

26:103.ar: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُمْ مُؤْمِنِينَ
26:103.en: Lo! herein is indeed a portent, yet most of them are not believers!

26:104.en: And lo, thy Lord! He is indeed the Mighty, the Merciful.

26:105.en: Noah's folk denied the messengers (of Allah),

26:106.ar: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ نُوحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
26:106.en: When their brother Noah said unto them: Will ye not ward off (evil)?

26:107.en: Lo! I am a faithful messenger unto you,

26:108.en: So keep your duty to Allah, and obey me.

26:109.ar: وَمَا أَسْأَلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِيَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
26:109.en: And I ask of you no wage therefor; my wage is the concern only of the Lord of the Worlds.

26:110.en: So keep your duty to Allah, and obey me.

26:111.en: They said: Shall we put faith in thee, when the lowest (of the people) follow thee?

26:112.ar: قَالَ وَمَا عِلْمِي بِمَا كَانُوا يَعْمَلُونَ
26:112.en: He said: And what knowledge have I of what they may have been doing (in the past)?

26:113.ar: إِنْ حِسَابُهُمْ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّي ۖ لَوْ تَشْعُرُونَ
26:113.en: Lo! their reckoning is my Lord's concern, if ye but knew;

26:114.en: And I am not (here) to repulse believers.

26:115.en: I am only a plain warner.

26:116.ar: قَالُوا لَئِنْ لَمْ تَنْتَهِ يَا نُوحُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ الْمَرْجُومِينَ
26:116.en: They said: If thou cease not, O Noah, thou wilt surely be among those stoned (to death).

26:117.en: He said: My Lord! Lo! my own folk deny me.

26:118.ar: فَافْتَحْ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَهُمْ فَتْحًا وَنَجِّنِي وَمَنْ مَعِيَ مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ
26:118.en: Therefor judge Thou between us, a (conclusive) judgment, and save me and those believers who are with me.

26:119.ar: فَأَنْجَيْنَاهُ وَمَنْ مَعَهُ فِي الْفُلْكِ الْمَشْحُونِ
26:119.en: And We saved him and those with him in the laden ship.

26:120.en: Then afterward We drowned the others.

26:121.ar: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُمْ مُؤْمِنِينَ
26:121.en: Lo! herein is indeed a portent, yet most of them are not believers.

26:122.en: And lo, thy Lord, He is indeed the Mighty, the Merciful.

26:123.en: (The tribe of) A'ad denied the messengers (of Allah).

26:124.ar: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ هُودٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
26:124.en: When their brother Hud said unto them: Will ye not ward off (evil)?

26:125.en: Lo! I am a faithful messenger unto you,

26:126.en: So keep your duty to Allah and obey me.

26:127.ar: وَمَا أَسْأَلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِيَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
26:127.en: And I ask of you no wage therefor; my wage is the concern only of the Lord of the Worlds.

26:128.en: Build ye on every high place a monument for vain delight?

26:129.en: And seek ye out strongholds, that haply ye may last for ever?

26:130.en: And if ye seize by force, seize ye as tyrants?

26:131.en: Rather keep your duty to Allah, and obey me.

26:132.en: Keep your duty toward Him Who hath aided you with (the good things) that ye know,

26:133.en: Hath aided you with cattle and sons.

26:135.ar: إِنِّي أَخَافُ عَلَيْكُمْ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
26:135.en: Lo! I fear for you the retribution of an awful day.

26:136.ar: قَالُوا سَوَاءٌ عَلَيْنَا أَوَعَظْتَ أَمْ لَمْ تَكُنْ مِنَ الْوَاعِظِينَ
26:136.en: They said: It is all one to us whether thou preachest or art not of those who preach;

26:137.en: This is but a fable of the men of old,

26:138.en: And we shall not be doomed.

26:139.ar: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَهْلَكْنَاهُمْ ۗ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُمْ مُؤْ
26:139.en: And they denied him; therefor We destroyed them. Lo! herein is indeed a portent, yet most of them are not beli

26:140.en: And lo! thy Lord, He is indeed the Mighty, the Merciful.

26:141.en: (The tribe of) Thamud denied the messengers (of Allah)

26:142.ar: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ صَالِحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
26:142.en: When their brother Salih said unto them: Will ye not ward off (evil)?

26:143.en: Lo! I am a faithful messenger unto you,

26:144.en: So keep your duty to Allah and obey me.

26:145.ar: وَمَا أَسْأَلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِيَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
26:145.en: And I ask of you no wage therefor; my wage is the concern only of the Lord of the Worlds.

26:146.en: Will ye be left secure in that which is here before us,

26:148.en: And tilled fields and heavy-sheathed palm-trees,

26:149.en: Though ye hew out dwellings in the mountain, being skilful?

26:150.en: Therefor keep your duty to Allah and obey me,

26:151.en: And obey not the command of the prodigal,

26:152.ar: الَّذِينَ يُفْسِدُونَ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا يُصْلِحُونَ
26:152.en: Who spread corruption in the earth, and reform not.

26:153.en: They said: Thou art but one of the bewitched;

26:154.ar: مَا أَنْتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِثْلُنَا فَأْتِ بِآيَةٍ إِنْ كُنْتَ مِنَ الصَّادِقِينَ
26:154.en: Thou art but a mortal like us. So bring some token if thou art of the truthful.

26:155.ar: قَالَ هَٰذِهِ نَاقَةٌ لَهَا شِرْبٌ وَلَكُمْ شِرْبُ يَوْمٍ مَعْلُومٍ
26:155.en: He said: (Behold) this she-camel. She hath the right to drink (at the well), and ye have the right to drink, (

26:156.ar: وَلَا تَمَسُّوهَا بِسُوءٍ فَيَأْخُذَكُمْ عَذَابُ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
26:156.en: And touch her not with ill lest there come on you the retribution of an awful day.

26:157.en: But they hamstrung her, and then were penitent.

26:158.ar: فَأَخَذَهُمُ الْعَذَابُ ۗ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُمْ مُؤْمِنِينَ
26:158.en: So the retribution came on them. Lo! herein is indeed a portent, yet most of them are not believers.

26:159.en: And lo! thy Lord! He is indeed the Mighty, the Merciful.

26:160.en: The folk of Lot denied the messengers (of Allah),

26:161.ar: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ لُوطٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
26:161.en: When their brother Lot said unto them: Will ye not ward off (evil)?

26:162.en: Lo! I am a faithful messenger unto you,

26:163.en: So keep your duty to Allah and obey me.

26:164.ar: وَمَا أَسْأَلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِيَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
26:164.en: And I ask of you no wage therefor; my wage is the concern only of the Lord of the Worlds.

26:165.en: What! Of all creatures do ye come unto the males,

26:166.ar: وَتَذَرُونَ مَا خَلَقَ لَكُمْ رَبُّكُمْ مِنْ أَزْوَاجِكُمْ ۚ بَلْ أَنْتُمْ قَوْمٌ عَادُونَ
26:166.en: And leave the wives your Lord created for you? Nay, but ye are froward folk.

26:167.ar: قَالُوا لَئِنْ لَمْ تَنْتَهِ يَا لُوطُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ الْمُخْرَجِينَ
26:167.en: They said: If thou cease not, O Lot, thou wilt soon be of the outcast.

26:168.en: He said: I am in truth of those who hate your conduct.

26:169.en: My Lord! Save me and my household from what they do.

26:170.en: So We saved him and his household, every one,

26:171.en: Save an old woman among those who stayed behind.

26:172.en: Then afterward We destroyed the others.

26:173.ar: وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ مَطَرًا ۖ فَسَاءَ مَطَرُ الْمُنْذَرِينَ
26:173.en: And We rained on them a rain. And dreadful is the rain of those who have been warned.

26:174.ar: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُمْ مُؤْمِنِينَ
26:174.en: Lo! herein is indeed a portent, yet most of them are not believers.

26:175.en: And lo! thy Lord, He is indeed the Mighty, the Merciful.

26:176.en: The dwellers in the wood (of Midian) denied the messengers (of Allah),

26:177.ar: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ شُعَيْبٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
26:177.en: When Shu'eyb said unto them: Will ye not ward off (evil)?

26:178.en: Lo! I am a faithful messenger unto you,

26:179.en: So keep your duty to Allah and obey me.

26:180.ar: وَمَا أَسْأَلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِيَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
26:180.en: And I ask of you no wage for it; my wage is the concern only of the Lord of the Worlds.

26:181.ar: ۞ أَوْفُوا الْكَيْلَ وَلَا تَكُونُوا مِنَ الْمُخْسِرِينَ
26:181.en: Give full measure, and be not of those who give less (than the due).

26:182.en: And weigh with the true balance.

26:183.ar: وَلَا تَبْخَسُوا النَّاسَ أَشْيَاءَهُمْ وَلَا تَعْثَوْا فِي الْأَرْضِ مُفْسِدِينَ
26:183.en: Wrong not mankind in their goods, and do not evil, making mischief, in the earth.

26:184.en: And keep your duty unto Him Who created you and the generations of the men of old.

26:185.en: They said: Thou art but one of the bewitched;

26:186.ar: وَمَا أَنْتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِثْلُنَا وَإِنْ نَظُنُّكَ لَمِنَ الْكَاذِبِينَ
26:186.en: Thou art but a mortal like us, and lo! we deem thee of the liars.

26:187.ar: فَأَسْقِطْ عَلَيْنَا كِسَفًا مِنَ السَّمَاءِ إِنْ كُنْتَ مِنَ الصَّادِقِينَ
26:187.en: Then make fragments of the heaven fall upon us, if thou art of the truthful.

26:188.en: He said: My Lord is Best Aware of what ye do.

26:189.ar: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَخَذَهُمْ عَذَابُ يَوْمِ الظُّلَّةِ ۚ إِنَّهُ كَانَ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
26:189.en: But they denied him, so there came on them the retribution of the day of gloom. Lo! it was the retribution of

26:190.ar: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُمْ مُؤْمِنِينَ
26:190.en: Lo! herein is indeed a portent; yet most of them are not believers.

26:191.en: And lo! thy Lord! He is indeed the Mighty, the Merciful.

26:192.en: And lo! it is a revelation of the Lord of the Worlds,

26:193.en: Which the True Spirit hath brought down

26:194.en: Upon thy heart, that thou mayst be (one) of the warners,

26:196.en: And lo! it is in the Scriptures of the men of old.

26:197.ar: أَوَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُمْ آيَةً أَنْ يَعْلَمَهُ عُلَمَاءُ بَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ
26:197.en: Is it not a token for them that the doctors of the Children of Israel know it?

26:198.en: And if We had revealed it unto one of any other nation than the Arabs,

26:199.ar: فَقَرَأَهُ عَلَيْهِمْ مَا كَانُوا بِهِ مُؤْمِنِينَ
26:199.en: And he had read it unto them, they would not have believed in it.

26:200.en: Thus do We make it traverse the hearts of the guilty.

26:201.ar: لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِهِ حَتَّىٰ يَرَوُا الْعَذَابَ الْأَلِيمَ
26:201.en: They will not believe in it till they behold the painful doom,

26:202.en: So that it will come upon them suddenly, when they perceive not.

26:203.en: Then they will say: Are we to be reprieved?

26:204.en: Would they (now) hasten on Our doom?

26:205.en: Hast thou then seen, if We content them for (long) years,

26:206.en: And then cometh that which they were promised,

26:207.ar: مَا أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُمْ مَا كَانُوا يُمَتَّعُونَ
26:207.en: (How) that wherewith they were contented naught availeth them?

26:208.ar: وَمَا أَهْلَكْنَا مِنْ قَرْيَةٍ إِلَّا لَهَا مُنْذِرُونَ
26:208.en: And We destroyed no township but it had its warners

26:209.en: For reminder, for We never were oppressors.

26:210.en: The devils did not bring it down.

26:211.en: It is not meet for them, nor is it in their power,

26:212.en: Lo! verily they are banished from the hearing.

26:213.ar: فَلَا تَدْعُ مَعَ اللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا آخَرَ فَتَكُونَ مِنَ الْمُعَذَّبِينَ
26:213.en: Therefor invoke not with Allah another god, lest thou be one of the doomed.

26:214.en: And warn thy tribe of near kindred,

26:215.ar: وَاخْفِضْ جَنَاحَكَ لِمَنِ اتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ
26:215.en: And lower thy wing (in kindness) unto those believers who follow thee.

26:216.ar: فَإِنْ عَصَوْكَ فَقُلْ إِنِّي بَرِيءٌ مِمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ
26:216.en: And if they (thy kinsfolk) disobey thee, say: Lo! I am innocent of what they do.

26:217.en: And put thy trust in the Mighty, the Merciful.

26:218.en: Who seeth thee when thou standest up (to pray)

26:219.en: And (seeth) thine abasement among those who fall prostrate (in worship).

26:220.en: Lo! He, only He, is the Hearer, the Knower.

26:221.ar: هَلْ أُنَبِّئُكُمْ عَلَىٰ مَنْ تَنَزَّلُ الشَّيَاطِينُ
26:221.en: Shall I inform you upon whom the devils descend?

26:222.en: They descend on every sinful, false one.

26:223.en: They listen eagerly, but most of them are liars.

26:224.en: As for poets, the erring follow them.

26:225.ar: أَلَمْ تَرَ أَنَّهُمْ فِي كُلِّ وَادٍ يَهِيمُونَ
26:225.en: Hast thou not seen how they stray in every valley,

26:226.en: And how they say that which they do not?

26:227.ar: إِلَّا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَمِلُوا الصَّالِحَاتِ وَذَكَرُوا اللَّهَ كَثِيرًا وَانْتَصَرُو
26:227.en: Save those who believe and do good works, and remember Allah much, and vindicate themselves after they have be

29:2.ar: أَحَسِبَ النَّاسُ أَنْ يُتْرَكُوا أَنْ يَقُولُوا آمَنَّا وَهُمْ لَا يُفْتَنُونَ
29:2.en: Do men imagine that they will be left (at ease) because they say, We believe, and will not be tested with affl

29:3.ar: وَلَقَدْ فَتَنَّا الَّذِينَ مِنْ قَبْلِهِمْ ۖ فَلَيَعْلَمَنَّ اللَّهُ الَّذِينَ صَدَقُوا و
29:3.en: Lo! We tested those who were before you. Thus Allah knoweth those who are sincere, and knoweth those who feign

29:4.ar: أَمْ حَسِبَ الَّذِينَ يَعْمَلُونَ السَّيِّئَاتِ أَنْ يَسْبِقُونَا ۚ سَاءَ مَا يَحْكُمُونَ
29:4.en: Or do those who do ill-deeds imagine that they can outstrip Us? Evil (for them) is that which they decide.

29:5.ar: مَنْ كَانَ يَرْجُو لِقَاءَ اللَّهِ فَإِنَّ أَجَلَ اللَّهِ لَآتٍ ۚ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَل
29:5.en: Whoso looketh forward to the meeting with Allah (let him know that) Allah's reckoning is surely nigh, and He i

29:6.ar: وَمَنْ جَاهَدَ فَإِنَّمَا يُجَاهِدُ لِنَفْسِهِ ۚ إِنَّ اللَّهَ لَغَنِيٌّ عَنِ الْعَالَمِين
29:6.en: And whosoever striveth, striveth only for himself, for lo! Allah is altogether Independent of (His) creatures.

29:7.ar: وَالَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَمِلُوا الصَّالِحَاتِ لَنُكَفِّرَنَّ عَنْهُمْ سَيِّئَاتِهِمْ وَلَنَ
29:7.en: And as for those who believe and do good works, We shall remit from them their evil deeds and shall repay them

29:8.ar: وَوَصَّيْنَا الْإِنْسَانَ بِوَالِدَيْهِ حُسْنًا ۖ وَإِنْ جَاهَدَاكَ لِتُشْرِكَ بِي مَا لَي
29:8.en: We have enjoined on man kindness to parents; but if they strive to make thee join with Me that of which thou h

29:9.ar: وَالَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَمِلُوا الصَّالِحَاتِ لَنُدْخِلَنَّهُمْ فِي الصَّالِحِينَ
29:9.en: And as for those who believe and do good works, We verily shall make them enter in among the righteous.

29:10.ar: وَمِنَ النَّاسِ مَنْ يَقُولُ آمَنَّا بِاللَّهِ فَإِذَا أُوذِيَ فِي اللَّهِ جَعَلَ فِتْنَةَ
29:10.en: Of mankind is he who saith: We believe in Allah, but, if he be made to suffer for the sake of Allah, he mistak

29:11.ar: وَلَيَعْلَمَنَّ اللَّهُ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَلَيَعْلَمَنَّ الْمُنَافِقِينَ
29:11.en: Verily Allah knoweth those who believe, and verily He knoweth the hypocrites.

29:12.ar: وَقَالَ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا لِلَّذِينَ آمَنُوا اتَّبِعُوا سَبِيلَنَا وَلْنَحْمِلْ خَطَايَاك
29:12.en: Those who disbelieve say unto those who believe: Follow our way (of religion) and we verily will bear your sin

29:13.ar: وَلَيَحْمِلُنَّ أَثْقَالَهُمْ وَأَثْقَالًا مَعَ أَثْقَالِهِمْ ۖ وَلَيُسْأَلُنَّ يَوْمَ الْ
29:13.en: But they verily will bear their own loads and other loads beside their own, and they verily will be questioned

29:14.ar: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِ فَلَبِثَ فِيهِمْ أَلْفَ سَنَةٍ إِلَّا خَمْسِين
29:14.en: And verily we sent Noah (as Our messenger) unto his folk, and he continued with them for a thousand years save

29:15.ar: فَأَنْجَيْنَاهُ وَأَصْحَابَ السَّفِينَةِ وَجَعَلْنَاهَا آيَةً لِلْعَالَمِينَ
29:15.en: And We rescued him and those with him in the ship, and made of it a portent for the peoples.

29:16.ar: وَإِبْرَاهِيمَ إِذْ قَالَ لِقَوْمِهِ اعْبُدُوا اللَّهَ وَاتَّقُوهُ ۖ ذَٰلِكُمْ خَيْرٌ لَكُ
29:16.en: And Abraham! (Remember) when he said unto his folk: Serve Allah, and keep your duty unto Him; that is better f

29:17.ar: إِنَّمَا تَعْبُدُونَ مِنْ دُونِ اللَّهِ أَوْثَانًا وَتَخْلُقُونَ إِفْكًا ۚ إِنَّ الَّذِينَ
29:17.en: Ye serve instead of Allah only idols, and ye only invent a lie. Lo! those whom ye serve instead of Allah own n

29:18.ar: وَإِنْ تُكَذِّبُوا فَقَدْ كَذَّبَ أُمَمٌ مِنْ قَبْلِكُمْ ۖ وَمَا عَلَى الرَّسُولِ إِلَّا ا
29:18.en: But if ye deny, then nations have denied before you. The messenger is only to convey (the message) plainly.

29:19.ar: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا كَيْفَ يُبْدِئُ اللَّهُ الْخَلْقَ ثُمَّ يُعِيدُهُ ۚ إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ عَلَى ا
29:19.en: See they not how Allah produceth creation, then reproduceth it? Lo! for Allah that is easy.

29:20.ar: قُلْ سِيرُوا فِي الْأَرْضِ فَانْظُرُوا كَيْفَ بَدَأَ الْخَلْقَ ۚ ثُمَّ اللَّهُ يُنْشِئُ ال
29:20.en: Say (O Muhammad): Travel in the land and see how He originated creation, then Allah bringeth forth the later g

29:21.ar: يُعَذِّبُ مَنْ يَشَاءُ وَيَرْحَمُ مَنْ يَشَاءُ ۖ وَإِلَيْهِ تُقْلَبُونَ
29:21.en: He punisheth whom He will and showeth mercy unto whom He will, and unto Him ye will be turned.

29:22.ar: وَمَا أَنْتُمْ بِمُعْجِزِينَ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ ۖ وَمَا لَكُمْ مِنْ دُونِ
29:22.en: Ye cannot escape (from Him) in the earth or in the sky, and beside Allah there is for you no friend or helper.

29:23.ar: وَالَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا بِآيَاتِ اللَّهِ وَلِقَائِهِ أُولَٰئِكَ يَئِسُوا مِنْ رَحْمَتِي وَأُو
29:23.en: Those who disbelieve in the revelations of Allah and in (their) Meeting with Him, such have no hope of My merc

29:24.ar: فَمَا كَانَ جَوَابَ قَوْمِهِ إِلَّا أَنْ قَالُوا اقْتُلُوهُ أَوْ حَرِّقُوهُ فَأَنْجَاهُ ال
29:24.en: But the answer of his folk was only that they said: "Kill him" or "Burn him." Then Allah saved him from the Fi

29:25.ar: وَقَالَ إِنَّمَا اتَّخَذْتُمْ مِنْ دُونِ اللَّهِ أَوْثَانًا مَوَدَّةَ بَيْنِكُمْ فِي الْحَ
29:25.en: He said: Ye have chosen only idols instead of Allah. The love between you is only in the life of the world. Th

29:26.ar: ۞ فَآمَنَ لَهُ لُوطٌ ۘ وَقَالَ إِنِّي مُهَاجِرٌ إِلَىٰ رَبِّي ۖ إِنَّهُ هُوَ الْعَزِيزُ ال
29:26.en: And Lot believed him, and said: Lo! I am a fugitive unto my Lord. Lo! He, only He, is the Mighty, the Wise.

29:27.ar: وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُ إِسْحَاقَ وَيَعْقُوبَ وَجَعَلْنَا فِي ذُرِّيَّتِهِ النُّبُوَّةَ وَالْكِتَ
29:27.en: And We bestowed on him Isaac and Jacob, and We established the prophethood and the Scripture among his seed, a

29:28.ar: وَلُوطًا إِذْ قَالَ لِقَوْمِهِ إِنَّكُمْ لَتَأْتُونَ الْفَاحِشَةَ مَا سَبَقَكُمْ بِهَا مِن
29:28.en: And Lot! (Remember) when he said unto his folk: Lo! ye commit lewdness such as no creature did before you.

29:29.ar: أَئِنَّكُمْ لَتَأْتُونَ الرِّجَالَ وَتَقْطَعُونَ السَّبِيلَ وَتَأْتُونَ فِي نَادِيكُمُ الْ
29:29.en: For come ye not in unto males, and cut ye not the road (for travellers), and commit ye not abomination in your

29:30.ar: قَالَ رَبِّ انْصُرْنِي عَلَى الْقَوْمِ الْمُفْسِدِينَ
29:30.en: He said: My Lord! Give me victory over folk who work corruption.

29:31.ar: وَلَمَّا جَاءَتْ رُسُلُنَا إِبْرَاهِيمَ بِالْبُشْرَىٰ قَالُوا إِنَّا مُهْلِكُو أَهْلِ هَٰذ
29:31.en: And when Our messengers brought Abraham the good news, they said: Lo! we are about to destroy the people of th

29:32.ar: قَالَ إِنَّ فِيهَا لُوطًا ۚ قَالُوا نَحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَنْ فِيهَا ۖ لَنُنَجِّيَنَّهُ وَأَه
29:32.en: He said: Lo! Lot is there. They said: We are best aware of who is there. We are to deliver him and his househo

29:33.ar: وَلَمَّا أَنْ جَاءَتْ رُسُلُنَا لُوطًا سِيءَ بِهِمْ وَضَاقَ بِهِمْ ذَرْعًا وَقَالُوا لَا ت
29:33.en: And when Our messengers came unto Lot, he was troubled upon their account, for he could not protect them; but

29:34.ar: إِنَّا مُنْزِلُونَ عَلَىٰ أَهْلِ هَٰذِهِ الْقَرْيَةِ رِجْزًا مِنَ السَّمَاءِ بِمَا كَانُوا
29:34.en: Lo! We are about to bring down upon the folk of this township a fury from the sky because they are evil-livers

29:35.ar: وَلَقَدْ تَرَكْنَا مِنْهَا آيَةً بَيِّنَةً لِقَوْمٍ يَعْقِلُونَ
29:35.en: And verily of that We have left a clear sign for people who have sense.

29:36.ar: وَإِلَىٰ مَدْيَنَ أَخَاهُمْ شُعَيْبًا فَقَالَ يَا قَوْمِ اعْبُدُوا اللَّهَ وَارْجُوا الْيَ
29:36.en: And unto Midian We sent Shu'eyb, their brother. He said: O my people! Serve Allah, and look forward to the Las

29:37.ar: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ الرَّجْفَةُ فَأَصْبَحُوا فِي دَارِهِمْ جَاثِمِينَ
29:37.en: But they denied him, and the dreadful earthquake took them, and morning found them prostrate in their dwelling

29:38.ar: وَعَادًا وَثَمُودَ وَقَدْ تَبَيَّنَ لَكُمْ مِنْ مَسَاكِنِهِمْ ۖ وَزَيَّنَ لَهُمُ الشَّيْطَ
29:38.en: And (the tribes of) A'ad and Thamud! (Their fate) is manifest unto you from their (ruined and deserted) dwelli

29:39.ar: وَقَارُونَ وَفِرْعَوْنَ وَهَامَانَ ۖ وَلَقَدْ جَاءَهُمْ مُوسَىٰ بِالْبَيِّنَاتِ فَاسْتَكْب
29:39.en: And Korah, Pharaoh and Haman! Moses came unto them with clear proofs (of Allah's Sovereignty), but they were b

29:40.ar: فَكُلًّا أَخَذْنَا بِذَنْبِهِ ۖ فَمِنْهُمْ مَنْ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِ حَاصِبًا وَمِنْهُمْ م
29:40.en: So We took each one in his sin; of them was he on whom We sent a hurricane, and of them was he who was overtak

29:41.ar: مَثَلُ الَّذِينَ اتَّخَذُوا مِنْ دُونِ اللَّهِ أَوْلِيَاءَ كَمَثَلِ الْعَنْكَبُوتِ اتَّخَذ
29:41.en: The likeness of those who choose other patrons than Allah is as the likeness of the spider when she taketh unt

29:42.ar: إِنَّ اللَّهَ يَعْلَمُ مَا يَدْعُونَ مِنْ دُونِهِ مِنْ شَيْءٍ ۚ وَهُوَ الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِي
29:42.en: Lo! Allah knoweth what thing they invoke instead of Him. He is the Mighty, the Wise.

29:43.ar: وَتِلْكَ الْأَمْثَالُ نَضْرِبُهَا لِلنَّاسِ ۖ وَمَا يَعْقِلُهَا إِلَّا الْعَالِمُونَ
29:43.en: As for these similitudes, We coin them for mankind, but none will grasp their meaning save the wise.

29:44.ar: خَلَقَ اللَّهُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ بِالْحَقِّ ۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَةً لِلْمُؤْمِ
29:44.en: Allah created the heavens and the earth with truth. Lo! therein is indeed a portent for believers.

29:45.ar: اتْلُ مَا أُوحِيَ إِلَيْكَ مِنَ الْكِتَابِ وَأَقِمِ الصَّلَاةَ ۖ إِنَّ الصَّلَاةَ تَنْهَىٰ
29:45.en: Recite that which hath been inspired in thee of the Scripture, and establish worship. Lo! worship preserveth f

29:46.ar: ۞ وَلَا تُجَادِلُوا أَهْلَ الْكِتَابِ إِلَّا بِالَّتِي هِيَ أَحْسَنُ إِلَّا الَّذِينَ ظَلَ
29:46.en: And argue not with the People of the Scripture unless it be in (a way) that is better, save with such of them

29:47.ar: وَكَذَٰلِكَ أَنْزَلْنَا إِلَيْكَ الْكِتَابَ ۚ فَالَّذِينَ آتَيْنَاهُمُ الْكِتَابَ يُؤْمِنُ
29:47.en: In like manner We have revealed unto thee the Scripture, and those unto whom We gave the Scripture aforetime w

29:48.ar: وَمَا كُنْتَ تَتْلُو مِنْ قَبْلِهِ مِنْ كِتَابٍ وَلَا تَخُطُّهُ بِيَمِينِكَ ۖ إِذًا لَارْت
29:48.en: And thou (O Muhammad) wast not a reader of any scripture before it, nor didst thou write it with thy right han

29:49.ar: بَلْ هُوَ آيَاتٌ بَيِّنَاتٌ فِي صُدُورِ الَّذِينَ أُوتُوا الْعِلْمَ ۚ وَمَا يَجْحَدُ بِآيَ
29:49.en: But it is clear revelations in the hearts of those who have been given knowledge, and none deny Our revelation

29:50.ar: وَقَالُوا لَوْلَا أُنْزِلَ عَلَيْهِ آيَاتٌ مِنْ رَبِّهِ ۖ قُلْ إِنَّمَا الْآيَاتُ عِنْدَ ا
29:50.en: And they say: Why are not portents sent down upon him from his Lord? Say: Portents are with Allah only, and I

29:51.ar: أَوَلَمْ يَكْفِهِمْ أَنَّا أَنْزَلْنَا عَلَيْكَ الْكِتَابَ يُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِمْ ۚ إِنَّ فِي
29:51.en: Is it not enough for them that We have sent down unto thee the Scripture which is read unto them? Lo! herein v

29:52.ar: قُلْ كَفَىٰ بِاللَّهِ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَكُمْ شَهِيدًا ۖ يَعْلَمُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْ
29:52.en: Say (unto them, O Muhammad): Allah sufficeth for witness between me and you. He knoweth whatsoever is in the h

29:53.ar: وَيَسْتَعْجِلُونَكَ بِالْعَذَابِ ۚ وَلَوْلَا أَجَلٌ مُسَمًّى لَجَاءَهُمُ الْعَذَابُ وَلَيَ
29:53.en: They bid thee hasten on the doom (of Allah). And if a term had not been appointed, the doom would assuredly ha

29:54.ar: يَسْتَعْجِلُونَكَ بِالْعَذَابِ وَإِنَّ جَهَنَّمَ لَمُحِيطَةٌ بِالْكَافِرِينَ
29:54.en: They bid thee hasten on the doom, when lo! hell verily will encompass the disbelievers

29:55.ar: يَوْمَ يَغْشَاهُمُ الْعَذَابُ مِنْ فَوْقِهِمْ وَمِنْ تَحْتِ أَرْجُلِهِمْ وَيَقُولُ ذُوقُوا
29:55.en: On the day when the doom will overwhelm them from above them and from underneath their feet, and He will say:

29:56.ar: يَا عِبَادِيَ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا إِنَّ أَرْضِي وَاسِعَةٌ فَإِيَّايَ فَاعْبُدُونِ
29:56.en: O my bondmen who believe! Lo! My earth is spacious. Therefor serve Me only.

29:57.ar: كُلُّ نَفْسٍ ذَائِقَةُ الْمَوْتِ ۖ ثُمَّ إِلَيْنَا تُرْجَعُونَ
29:57.en: Every soul will taste of death. Then unto Us ye will be returned.

29:58.ar: وَالَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَمِلُوا الصَّالِحَاتِ لَنُبَوِّئَنَّهُمْ مِنَ الْجَنَّةِ غُرَفًا تَ
29:58.en: Those who believe and do good works, them verily We shall house in lofty dwellings of the Garden underneath wh

29:59.en: Who persevere, and put their trust in their Lord!

29:60.ar: وَكَأَيِّنْ مِنْ دَابَّةٍ لَا تَحْمِلُ رِزْقَهَا اللَّهُ يَرْزُقُهَا وَإِيَّاكُمْ ۚ وَهُوَ
29:60.en: And how many an animal there is that beareth not its own provision! Allah provideth for it and for you. He is

29:61.ar: وَلَئِنْ سَأَلْتَهُمْ مَنْ خَلَقَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ وَسَخَّرَ الشَّمْسَ وَالْقَمَر
29:61.en: And if thou wert to ask them: Who created the heavens and the earth, and constrained the sun and the moon (to

29:62.ar: اللَّهُ يَبْسُطُ الرِّزْقَ لِمَنْ يَشَاءُ مِنْ عِبَادِهِ وَيَقْدِرُ لَهُ ۚ إِنَّ اللَّهَ ب
29:62.en: Allah maketh the provision wide for whom He will of His bondmen, and straiteneth it for whom (He will). Lo! Al

29:63.ar: وَلَئِنْ سَأَلْتَهُمْ مَنْ نَزَّلَ مِنَ السَّمَاءِ مَاءً فَأَحْيَا بِهِ الْأَرْضَ مِنْ بَع
29:63.en: And if thou wert to ask them: Who causeth water to come down from the sky, and therewith reviveth the earth af

29:64.ar: وَمَا هَٰذِهِ الْحَيَاةُ الدُّنْيَا إِلَّا لَهْوٌ وَلَعِبٌ ۚ وَإِنَّ الدَّارَ الْآخِرَةَ ل
29:64.en: This life of the world is but a pastime and a game. Lo! the home of the Hereafter - that is Life, if they but

29:65.ar: فَإِذَا رَكِبُوا فِي الْفُلْكِ دَعَوُا اللَّهَ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ الدِّينَ فَلَمَّا نَجَّاهُ
29:65.en: And when they mount upon the ships they pray to Allah, making their faith pure for Him only, but when He bring

29:66.ar: لِيَكْفُرُوا بِمَا آتَيْنَاهُمْ وَلِيَتَمَتَّعُوا ۖ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
29:66.en: That they may disbelieve in that which We have given them, and that they may take their ease. But they will co

29:67.ar: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا أَنَّا جَعَلْنَا حَرَمًا آمِنًا وَيُتَخَطَّفُ النَّاسُ مِنْ حَوْلِهِمْ ۚ
29:67.en: Have they not seen that We have appointed a sanctuary immune (from violence), while mankind are ravaged all ar

29:68.ar: وَمَنْ أَظْلَمُ مِمَّنِ افْتَرَىٰ عَلَى اللَّهِ كَذِبًا أَوْ كَذَّبَ بِالْحَقِّ لَمَّا جَا
29:68.en: Who doeth greater wrong than he who inventeth a lie concerning Allah, or denieth the truth when it cometh unto

29:69.ar: وَالَّذِينَ جَاهَدُوا فِينَا لَنَهْدِيَنَّهُمْ سُبُلَنَا ۚ وَإِنَّ اللَّهَ لَمَعَ الْمُحْس
29:69.en: As for those who strive in Us, We surely guide them to Our paths, and lo! Allah is with the good.

33:1.ar: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ اتَّقِ اللَّهَ وَلَا تُطِعِ
33:1.en: O Prophet! Keep thy duty to Allah and obey not the disbelievers and the hypocrites. Lo! Allah is Knower, Wise.

33:2.ar: وَاتَّبِعْ مَا يُوحَىٰ إِلَيْكَ مِنْ رَبِّكَ ۚ إِنَّ اللَّهَ كَانَ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ خَبِي
33:2.en: And follow that which is inspired in thee from thy Lord. Lo! Allah is Aware of what ye do.

33:3.ar: وَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى اللَّهِ ۚ وَكَفَىٰ بِاللَّهِ وَكِيلًا
33:3.en: And put thy trust in Allah, for Allah is sufficient as Trustee.

33:4.ar: مَا جَعَلَ اللَّهُ لِرَجُلٍ مِنْ قَلْبَيْنِ فِي جَوْفِهِ ۚ وَمَا جَعَلَ أَزْوَاجَكُمُ اللّ
33:4.en: Allah hath not assigned unto any man two hearts within his body, nor hath He made your wives whom ye declare (

33:5.ar: ادْعُوهُمْ لِآبَائِهِمْ هُوَ أَقْسَطُ عِنْدَ اللَّهِ ۚ فَإِنْ لَمْ تَعْلَمُوا آبَاءَهُمْ ف
33:5.en: Proclaim their real parentage. That will be more equitable in the sight of Allah. And if ye know not their fat

33:6.ar: النَّبِيُّ أَوْلَىٰ بِالْمُؤْمِنِينَ مِنْ أَنْفُسِهِمْ ۖ وَأَزْوَاجُهُ أُمَّهَاتُهُمْ ۗ وَ
33:6.en: The Prophet is closer to the believers than their selves, and his wives are (as) their mothers. And the owners

33:7.ar: وَإِذْ أَخَذْنَا مِنَ النَّبِيِّينَ مِيثَاقَهُمْ وَمِنْكَ وَمِنْ نُوحٍ وَإِبْرَاهِيمَ وَمُ
33:7.en: And when We exacted a covenant from the prophets, and from thee (O Muhammad) and from Noah and Abraham and Mos

33:8.ar: لِيَسْأَلَ الصَّادِقِينَ عَنْ صِدْقِهِمْ ۚ وَأَعَدَّ لِلْكَافِرِينَ عَذَابًا أَلِيمًا
33:8.en: That He may ask the loyal of their loyalty. And He hath prepared a painful doom for the unfaithful.

33:9.ar: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا اذْكُرُوا نِعْمَةَ اللَّهِ عَلَيْكُمْ إِذْ جَاءَتْكُمْ جُنُ
33:9.en: O ye who believe! Remember Allah's favour unto you when there came against you hosts, and We sent against them

33:10.ar: إِذْ جَاءُوكُمْ مِنْ فَوْقِكُمْ وَمِنْ أَسْفَلَ مِنْكُمْ وَإِذْ زَاغَتِ الْأَبْصَارُ وَبَل
33:10.en: When they came upon you from above you and from below you, and when eyes grew wild and hearts reached to the t

33:11.ar: هُنَالِكَ ابْتُلِيَ الْمُؤْمِنُونَ وَزُلْزِلُوا زِلْزَالًا شَدِيدًا
33:11.en: There were the believers sorely tried, and shaken with a mighty shock.

33:12.ar: وَإِذْ يَقُولُ الْمُنَافِقُونَ وَالَّذِينَ فِي قُلُوبِهِمْ مَرَضٌ مَا وَعَدَنَا اللَّهُ وَ
33:12.en: And when the hypocrites, and those in whose hearts is a disease, were saying: Allah and His messenger promised

33:13.ar: وَإِذْ قَالَتْ طَائِفَةٌ مِنْهُمْ يَا أَهْلَ يَثْرِبَ لَا مُقَامَ لَكُمْ فَارْجِعُوا ۚ وَي
33:13.en: And when a party of them said: O folk of Yathrib! There is no stand (possible) for you, therefor turn back. An

33:14.ar: وَلَوْ دُخِلَتْ عَلَيْهِمْ مِنْ أَقْطَارِهَا ثُمَّ سُئِلُوا الْفِتْنَةَ لَآتَوْهَا وَمَا ت
33:14.en: If the enemy had entered from all sides and they had been exhorted to treachery, they would have committed it,

33:15.ar: وَلَقَدْ كَانُوا عَاهَدُوا اللَّهَ مِنْ قَبْلُ لَا يُوَلُّونَ الْأَدْبَارَ ۚ وَكَانَ عَهْد
33:15.en: And verily they had already sworn unto Allah that they would not turn their backs (to the foe). An oath to All

33:16.ar: قُلْ لَنْ يَنْفَعَكُمُ الْفِرَارُ إِنْ فَرَرْتُمْ مِنَ الْمَوْتِ أَوِ الْقَتْلِ وَإِذًا لَ
33:16.en: Say: Flight will not avail you if ye flee from death or killing, and then ye dwell in comfort but a little whi

33:17.ar: قُلْ مَنْ ذَا الَّذِي يَعْصِمُكُمْ مِنَ اللَّهِ إِنْ أَرَادَ بِكُمْ سُوءًا أَوْ أَرَادَ بِ
33:17.en: Say: Who is he who can preserve you from Allah if He intendeth harm for you, or intendeth mercy for you. They

33:18.ar: ۞ قَدْ يَعْلَمُ اللَّهُ الْمُعَوِّقِينَ مِنْكُمْ وَالْقَائِلِينَ لِإِخْوَانِهِمْ هَلُمَّ إ
33:18.en: Allah already knoweth those of you who hinder, and those who say unto their brethren: "Come ye hither unto us!

33:19.ar: أَشِحَّةً عَلَيْكُمْ ۖ فَإِذَا جَاءَ الْخَوْفُ رَأَيْتَهُمْ يَنْظُرُونَ إِلَيْكَ تَدُورُ أ
33:19.en: Being sparing of their help to you (believers). But when the fear cometh, then thou (Muhammad) seest them rega

33:20.ar: يَحْسَبُونَ الْأَحْزَابَ لَمْ يَذْهَبُوا ۖ وَإِنْ يَأْتِ الْأَحْزَابُ يَوَدُّوا لَوْ أَنَّ
33:20.en: They hold that the clans have not retired (for good); and if the clans should advance (again), they would fain

33:21.ar: لَقَدْ كَانَ لَكُمْ فِي رَسُولِ اللَّهِ أُسْوَةٌ حَسَنَةٌ لِمَنْ كَانَ يَرْجُو اللَّهَ وَا
33:21.en: Verily in the messenger of Allah ye have a good example for him who looketh unto Allah and the Last Day, and r

33:22.ar: وَلَمَّا رَأَى الْمُؤْمِنُونَ الْأَحْزَابَ قَالُوا هَٰذَا مَا وَعَدَنَا اللَّهُ وَرَسُولُه
33:22.en: And when the true believers saw the clans, they said: This is that which Allah and His messenger promised us.

33:23.ar: مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ رِجَالٌ صَدَقُوا مَا عَاهَدُوا اللَّهَ عَلَيْهِ ۖ فَمِنْهُمْ مَنْ قَضَ
33:23.en: Of the believers are men who are true to that which they covenanted with Allah. Some of them have paid their v

33:24.ar: لِيَجْزِيَ اللَّهُ الصَّادِقِينَ بِصِدْقِهِمْ وَيُعَذِّبَ الْمُنَافِقِينَ إِنْ شَاءَ أَوْ
33:24.en: That Allah may reward the true men for their truth, and punish the hypocrites if He will, or relent toward the

33:25.ar: وَرَدَّ اللَّهُ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا بِغَيْظِهِمْ لَمْ يَنَالُوا خَيْرًا ۚ وَكَفَى اللَّهُ ا
33:25.en: And Allah repulsed the disbelievers in their wrath; they gained no good. Allah averted their attack from the b

33:26.ar: وَأَنْزَلَ الَّذِينَ ظَاهَرُوهُمْ مِنْ أَهْلِ الْكِتَابِ مِنْ صَيَاصِيهِمْ وَقَذَفَ فِي قُ
33:26.en: And He brought those of the People of the Scripture who supported them down from their strongholds, and cast p

33:27.ar: وَأَوْرَثَكُمْ أَرْضَهُمْ وَدِيَارَهُمْ وَأَمْوَالَهُمْ وَأَرْضًا لَمْ تَطَئُوهَا ۚ وَكَان
33:27.en: And He caused you to inherit their land and their houses and their wealth, and land ye have not trodden. Allah

33:28.ar: يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ قُلْ لِأَزْوَاجِكَ إِنْ كُنْتُنَّ تُرِدْنَ الْحَيَاةَ الدُّنْيَا و
33:28.en: O Prophet! Say unto thy wives: If ye desire the world's life and its adornment, come! I will content you and w

33:29.ar: وَإِنْ كُنْتُنَّ تُرِدْنَ اللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُ وَالدَّارَ الْآخِرَةَ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ أَعَدّ
33:29.en: But if ye desire Allah and His messenger and the abode of the Hereafter, then lo! Allah hath prepared for the

33:30.ar: يَا نِسَاءَ النَّبِيِّ مَنْ يَأْتِ مِنْكُنَّ بِفَاحِشَةٍ مُبَيِّنَةٍ يُضَاعَفْ لَهَا الْعَ
33:30.en: O ye wives of the Prophet! Whosoever of you committeth manifest lewdness, the punishment for her will be doubl

33:31.ar: ۞ وَمَنْ يَقْنُتْ مِنْكُنَّ لِلَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِ وَتَعْمَلْ صَالِحًا نُؤْتِهَا أَجْرَهَا مَ
33:31.en: And whosoever of you is submissive unto Allah and His messenger and doeth right, We shall give her her reward

33:32.ar: يَا نِسَاءَ النَّبِيِّ لَسْتُنَّ كَأَحَدٍ مِنَ النِّسَاءِ ۚ إِنِ اتَّقَيْتُنَّ فَلَا تَخْض
33:32.en: O ye wives of the Prophet! Ye are not like any other women. If ye keep your duty (to Allah), then be not soft

33:33.ar: وَقَرْنَ فِي بُيُوتِكُنَّ وَلَا تَبَرَّجْنَ تَبَرُّجَ الْجَاهِلِيَّةِ الْأُولَىٰ ۖ وَأَقِم
33:33.en: And stay in your houses. Bedizen not yourselves with the bedizenment of the Time of Ignorance. Be regular in p

33:34.ar: وَاذْكُرْنَ مَا يُتْلَىٰ فِي بُيُوتِكُنَّ مِنْ آيَاتِ اللَّهِ وَالْحِكْمَةِ ۚ إِنَّ اللَّه
33:34.en: And bear in mind that which is recited in your houses of the revelations of Allah and wisdom. Lo! Allah is Sub

33:35.ar: إِنَّ الْمُسْلِمِينَ وَالْمُسْلِمَاتِ وَالْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتِ وَالْقَانِتِينَ وَ
33:35.en: Lo! men who surrender unto Allah, and women who surrender, and men who believe and women who believe, and men

33:36.ar: وَمَا كَانَ لِمُؤْمِنٍ وَلَا مُؤْمِنَةٍ إِذَا قَضَى اللَّهُ وَرَسُولُهُ أَمْرًا أَنْ يَكُو
33:36.en: And it becometh not a believing man or a believing woman, when Allah and His messenger have decided an affair

33:37.ar: وَإِذْ تَقُولُ لِلَّذِي أَنْعَمَ اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَأَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْهِ أَمْسِكْ عَلَيْكَ
33:37.en: And when thou saidst unto him on whom Allah hath conferred favour and thou hast conferred favour: Keep thy wif

33:38.ar: مَا كَانَ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ مِنْ حَرَجٍ فِيمَا فَرَضَ اللَّهُ لَهُ ۖ سُنَّةَ اللَّهِ فِي ال
33:38.en: There is no reproach for the Prophet in that which Allah maketh his due. That was Allah's way with those who p

33:39.ar: الَّذِينَ يُبَلِّغُونَ رِسَالَاتِ اللَّهِ وَيَخْشَوْنَهُ وَلَا يَخْشَوْنَ أَحَدًا إِلَّا ا
33:39.en: Who delivered the messages of Allah and feared Him, and feared none save Allah. Allah keepeth good account.

33:40.ar: مَا كَانَ مُحَمَّدٌ أَبَا أَحَدٍ مِنْ رِجَالِكُمْ وَلَٰكِنْ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ وَخَاتَمَ النّ
33:40.en: Muhammad is not the father of any man among you, but he is the messenger of Allah and the Seal of the Prophets

33:41.ar: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا اذْكُرُوا اللَّهَ ذِكْرًا كَثِيرًا
33:41.en: O ye who believe! Remember Allah with much remembrance.

33:42.en: And glorify Him early and late.

33:43.ar: هُوَ الَّذِي يُصَلِّي عَلَيْكُمْ وَمَلَائِكَتُهُ لِيُخْرِجَكُمْ مِنَ الظُّلُمَاتِ إِلَى ال
33:43.en: He it is Who blesseth you, and His angels (bless you), that He may bring you forth from darkness unto light; a

33:44.ar: تَحِيَّتُهُمْ يَوْمَ يَلْقَوْنَهُ سَلَامٌ ۚ وَأَعَدَّ لَهُمْ أَجْرًا كَرِيمًا
33:44.en: Their salutation on the day when they shall meet Him will be: Peace. And He hath prepared for them a goodly re

33:45.ar: يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ إِنَّا أَرْسَلْنَاكَ شَاهِدًا وَمُبَشِّرًا وَنَذِيرًا
33:45.en: O Prophet! Lo! We have sent thee as a witness and a bringer of good tidings and a warner.

33:46.ar: وَدَاعِيًا إِلَى اللَّهِ بِإِذْنِهِ وَسِرَاجًا مُنِيرًا
33:46.en: And as a summoner unto Allah by His permission, and as a lamp that giveth light.

33:47.ar: وَبَشِّرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ بِأَنَّ لَهُمْ مِنَ اللَّهِ فَضْلًا كَبِيرًا
33:47.en: And announce unto the believers the good tidings that they will have great bounty from Allah.

33:48.ar: وَلَا تُطِعِ الْكَافِرِينَ وَالْمُنَافِقِينَ وَدَعْ أَذَاهُمْ وَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى اللَّهِ ۚ
33:48.en: And incline not to the disbelievers and the hypocrites. Disregard their noxious talk, and put thy trust in All

33:49.ar: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا إِذَا نَكَحْتُمُ الْمُؤْمِنَاتِ ثُمَّ طَلَّقْتُمُوهُنَّ مِن
33:49.en: O ye who believe! If ye wed believing women and divorce them before ye have touched them, then there is no per

33:50.ar: يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ إِنَّا أَحْلَلْنَا لَكَ أَزْوَاجَكَ اللَّاتِي آتَيْتَ أُجُورَهُنَّ
33:50.en: O Prophet! Lo! We have made lawful unto thee thy wives unto whom thou hast paid their dowries, and those whom

33:51.ar: ۞ تُرْجِي مَنْ تَشَاءُ مِنْهُنَّ وَتُؤْوِي إِلَيْكَ مَنْ تَشَاءُ ۖ وَمَنِ ابْتَغَيْتَ مِمّ
33:51.en: Thou canst defer whom thou wilt of them and receive unto thee whom thou wilt, and whomsoever thou desirest of

33:52.ar: لَا يَحِلُّ لَكَ النِّسَاءُ مِنْ بَعْدُ وَلَا أَنْ تَبَدَّلَ بِهِنَّ مِنْ أَزْوَاجٍ وَلَوْ
33:52.en: It is not allowed thee to take (other) women henceforth, nor that thou shouldst change them for other wives ev

33:53.ar: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا لَا تَدْخُلُوا بُيُوتَ النَّبِيِّ إِلَّا أَنْ يُؤْذَنَ لَكُ
33:53.en: O Ye who believe! Enter not the dwellings of the Prophet for a meal without waiting for the proper time, unles

33:54.ar: إِنْ تُبْدُوا شَيْئًا أَوْ تُخْفُوهُ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ كَانَ بِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ عَلِيمًا
33:54.en: Whether ye divulge a thing or keep it hidden, lo! Allah is ever Knower of all things.

33:55.ar: لَا جُنَاحَ عَلَيْهِنَّ فِي آبَائِهِنَّ وَلَا أَبْنَائِهِنَّ وَلَا إِخْوَانِهِنَّ وَلَا أَ
33:55.en: It is no sin for them (thy wives) to converse freely) with their fathers, or their sons, or their brothers, or

33:56.ar: إِنَّ اللَّهَ وَمَلَائِكَتَهُ يُصَلُّونَ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ ۚ يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا
33:56.en: Lo! Allah and His angels shower blessings on the Prophet. O ye who believe! Ask blessings on him and salute hi

33:57.ar: إِنَّ الَّذِينَ يُؤْذُونَ اللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُ لَعَنَهُمُ اللَّهُ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَ
33:57.en: Lo! those who malign Allah and His messenger, Allah hath cursed them in the world and the Hereafter, and hath

33:58.ar: وَالَّذِينَ يُؤْذُونَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتِ بِغَيْرِ مَا اكْتَسَبُوا فَقَدِ احْت
33:58.en: And those who malign believing men and believing women undeservedly, they bear the guilt of slander and manife

33:59.ar: يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ قُلْ لِأَزْوَاجِكَ وَبَنَاتِكَ وَنِسَاءِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ يُدْنِينَ
33:59.en: O Prophet! Tell thy wives and thy daughters and the women of the believers to draw their cloaks close round th

33:60.ar: ۞ لَئِنْ لَمْ يَنْتَهِ الْمُنَافِقُونَ وَالَّذِينَ فِي قُلُوبِهِمْ مَرَضٌ وَالْمُرْجِفُونَ
33:60.en: If the hypocrites, and those in whose hearts is a disease, and the alarmists in the city do not cease, We veri

33:61.ar: مَلْعُونِينَ ۖ أَيْنَمَا ثُقِفُوا أُخِذُوا وَقُتِّلُوا تَقْتِيلًا
33:61.en: Accursed, they will be seized wherever found and slain with a (fierce) slaughter.

33:62.ar: سُنَّةَ اللَّهِ فِي الَّذِينَ خَلَوْا مِنْ قَبْلُ ۖ وَلَنْ تَجِدَ لِسُنَّةِ اللَّهِ تَبْدِ
33:62.en: That was the way of Allah in the case of those who passed away of old; thou wilt not find for the way of Allah

33:63.ar: يَسْأَلُكَ النَّاسُ عَنِ السَّاعَةِ ۖ قُلْ إِنَّمَا عِلْمُهَا عِنْدَ اللَّهِ ۚ وَمَا يُدْر
33:63.en: Men ask thee of the Hour. Say: The knowledge of it is with Allah only. What can convey (the knowledge) unto th

33:64.ar: إِنَّ اللَّهَ لَعَنَ الْكَافِرِينَ وَأَعَدَّ لَهُمْ سَعِيرًا
33:64.en: Lo! Allah hath cursed the disbelievers, and hath prepared for them a flaming fire,

33:65.ar: خَالِدِينَ فِيهَا أَبَدًا ۖ لَا يَجِدُونَ وَلِيًّا وَلَا نَصِيرًا
33:65.en: Wherein they will abide for ever. They will find (then) no protecting friend nor helper.

33:66.ar: يَوْمَ تُقَلَّبُ وُجُوهُهُمْ فِي النَّارِ يَقُولُونَ يَا لَيْتَنَا أَطَعْنَا اللَّهَ وَأَط
33:66.en: On the day when their faces are turned over in the Fire, they say: Oh, would that we had obeyed Allah and had

33:67.ar: وَقَالُوا رَبَّنَا إِنَّا أَطَعْنَا سَادَتَنَا وَكُبَرَاءَنَا فَأَضَلُّونَا السَّبِيلَا
33:67.en: And they say: Our Lord! Lo! we obeyed our princes and great men, and they misled us from the Way.

33:68.ar: رَبَّنَا آتِهِمْ ضِعْفَيْنِ مِنَ الْعَذَابِ وَالْعَنْهُمْ لَعْنًا كَبِيرًا
33:68.en: Our Lord! Oh, give them double torment and curse them with a mighty curse.

33:69.ar: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا لَا تَكُونُوا كَالَّذِينَ آذَوْا مُوسَىٰ فَبَرَّأَهُ اللَّه
33:69.en: O ye who believe! Be not as those who slandered Moses, but Allah proved his innocence of that which they alleg

33:70.ar: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا اتَّقُوا اللَّهَ وَقُولُوا قَوْلًا سَدِيدًا
33:70.en: O ye who believe! Guard your duty to Allah, and speak words straight to the point;

33:71.ar: يُصْلِحْ لَكُمْ أَعْمَالَكُمْ وَيَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ ذُنُوبَكُمْ ۗ وَمَنْ يُطِعِ اللَّهَ وَرَسُ
33:71.en: He will adjust your works for you and will forgive you your sins. Whosoever obeyeth Allah and His messenger, h

33:72.ar: إِنَّا عَرَضْنَا الْأَمَانَةَ عَلَى السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَالْجِبَالِ فَأَبَيْنَ أَنْ
33:72.en: Lo! We offered the trust unto the heavens and the earth and the hills, but they shrank from bearing it and wer

33:73.ar: لِيُعَذِّبَ اللَّهُ الْمُنَافِقِينَ وَالْمُنَافِقَاتِ وَالْمُشْرِكِينَ وَالْمُشْرِكَاتِ وَ
33:73.en: So Allah punisheth hypocritical men and hypocritical women, and idolatrous men and idolatrous women. But Allah

43:2.en: By the Scripture which maketh plain,

43:3.ar: إِنَّا جَعَلْنَاهُ قُرْآنًا عَرَبِيًّا لَعَلَّكُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ
43:3.en: Lo! We have appointed it a Lecture, in Arabic that haply ye may understand.

43:4.ar: وَإِنَّهُ فِي أُمِّ الْكِتَابِ لَدَيْنَا لَعَلِيٌّ حَكِيمٌ
43:4.en: And Lo! in the Source of Decrees, which We possess, it is indeed sublime, decisive.

43:5.ar: أَفَنَضْرِبُ عَنْكُمُ الذِّكْرَ صَفْحًا أَنْ كُنْتُمْ قَوْمًا مُسْرِفِينَ
43:5.en: Shall We utterly ignore you because ye are a wanton folk?

43:6.ar: وَكَمْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِنْ نَبِيٍّ فِي الْأَوَّلِينَ
43:6.en: How many a prophet did We send among the men of old!

43:7.ar: وَمَا يَأْتِيهِمْ مِنْ نَبِيٍّ إِلَّا كَانُوا بِهِ يَسْتَهْزِئُونَ
43:7.en: And never came there unto them a prophet but they used to mock him.

43:8.ar: فَأَهْلَكْنَا أَشَدَّ مِنْهُمْ بَطْشًا وَمَضَىٰ مَثَلُ الْأَوَّلِينَ
43:8.en: Then We destroyed men mightier than these in prowess; and the example of the men of old hath gone (before them

43:9.ar: وَلَئِنْ سَأَلْتَهُمْ مَنْ خَلَقَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ لَيَقُولُنَّ خَلَقَهُنَّ الْعَ
43:9.en: And if thou (Muhammad) ask them: Who created the heavens and the earth, they will surely answer: The Mighty, t

43:10.ar: الَّذِي جَعَلَ لَكُمُ الْأَرْضَ مَهْدًا وَجَعَلَ لَكُمْ فِيهَا سُبُلًا لَعَلَّكُمْ تَهْتَد
43:10.en: Who made the earth a resting-place for you, and placed roads for you therein, that haply ye may find your way;

43:11.ar: وَالَّذِي نَزَّلَ مِنَ السَّمَاءِ مَاءً بِقَدَرٍ فَأَنْشَرْنَا بِهِ بَلْدَةً مَيْتًا ۚ كَذ
43:11.en: And Who sendeth down water from the sky in (due) measure, and We revive a dead land therewith. Even so will ye

43:12.ar: وَالَّذِي خَلَقَ الْأَزْوَاجَ كُلَّهَا وَجَعَلَ لَكُمْ مِنَ الْفُلْكِ وَالْأَنْعَامِ مَا ت
43:12.en: He Who created all the pairs, and appointed for you ships and cattle whereupon ye ride.

43:13.ar: لِتَسْتَوُوا عَلَىٰ ظُهُورِهِ ثُمَّ تَذْكُرُوا نِعْمَةَ رَبِّكُمْ إِذَا اسْتَوَيْتُمْ عَلَ
43:13.en: That ye may mount upon their backs, and may remember your Lord's favour when ye mount thereon, and may say: Gl
