43:14.en: And lo! unto our Lord we surely are returning.

43:15.ar: وَجَعَلُوا لَهُ مِنْ عِبَادِهِ جُزْءًا ۚ إِنَّ الْإِنْسَانَ لَكَفُورٌ مُبِينٌ
43:15.en: And they allot to Him a portion of His bondmen! Lo! man is verily a mere ingrate.

43:16.ar: أَمِ اتَّخَذَ مِمَّا يَخْلُقُ بَنَاتٍ وَأَصْفَاكُمْ بِالْبَنِينَ
43:16.en: Or chooseth He daughters of all that He hath created, and honoureth He you with sons?

43:17.ar: وَإِذَا بُشِّرَ أَحَدُهُمْ بِمَا ضَرَبَ لِلرَّحْمَٰنِ مَثَلًا ظَلَّ وَجْهُهُ مُسْوَدًّا وَ
43:17.en: And if one of them hath tidings of that which he likeneth to the Beneficent One, his countenance becometh blac

43:18.ar: أَوَمَنْ يُنَشَّأُ فِي الْحِلْيَةِ وَهُوَ فِي الْخِصَامِ غَيْرُ مُبِينٍ
43:18.en: (Liken they then to Allah) that which is bred up in outward show, and in dispute cannot make itself plain?

43:19.ar: وَجَعَلُوا الْمَلَائِكَةَ الَّذِينَ هُمْ عِبَادُ الرَّحْمَٰنِ إِنَاثًا ۚ أَشَهِدُوا خَلْقَ
43:19.en: And they make the angels, who are the slaves of the Beneficent, females. Did they witness their creation? Thei

43:20.ar: وَقَالُوا لَوْ شَاءَ الرَّحْمَٰنُ مَا عَبَدْنَاهُمْ ۗ مَا لَهُمْ بِذَٰلِكَ مِنْ عِلْمٍ ۖ إ
43:20.en: And they say: If the Beneficent One had (so) willed, we should not have worshipped them. They have no knowledg

43:21.ar: أَمْ آتَيْنَاهُمْ كِتَابًا مِنْ قَبْلِهِ فَهُمْ بِهِ مُسْتَمْسِكُونَ
43:21.en: Or have We given them any scripture before (this Qur'an) so that they are holding fast thereto?

43:22.ar: بَلْ قَالُوا إِنَّا وَجَدْنَا آبَاءَنَا عَلَىٰ أُمَّةٍ وَإِنَّا عَلَىٰ آثَارِهِمْ مُهْتَدُ
43:22.en: Nay, for they say only: Lo! we found our fathers following a religion, and we are guided by their footprints.

43:23.ar: وَكَذَٰلِكَ مَا أَرْسَلْنَا مِنْ قَبْلِكَ فِي قَرْيَةٍ مِنْ نَذِيرٍ إِلَّا قَالَ مُتْرَفُو
43:23.en: And even so We sent not a warner before thee (Muhammad) into any township but its luxurious ones said: Lo! we

43:24.ar: ۞ قَالَ أَوَلَوْ جِئْتُكُمْ بِأَهْدَىٰ مِمَّا وَجَدْتُمْ عَلَيْهِ آبَاءَكُمْ ۖ قَالُوا إِن
43:24.en: (And the warner) said: What! Even though I bring you better guidance than that ye found your fathers following

43:25.ar: فَانْتَقَمْنَا مِنْهُمْ ۖ فَانْظُرْ كَيْفَ كَانَ عَاقِبَةُ الْمُكَذِّبِينَ
43:25.en: So We requited them. Then see the nature of the consequence for the rejecters!

43:26.ar: وَإِذْ قَالَ إِبْرَاهِيمُ لِأَبِيهِ وَقَوْمِهِ إِنَّنِي بَرَاءٌ مِمَّا تَعْبُدُونَ
43:26.en: And when Abraham said unto his father and his folk: Lo! I am innocent of what ye worship

43:27.en: Save Him Who did create me, for He will surely guide me.

43:28.ar: وَجَعَلَهَا كَلِمَةً بَاقِيَةً فِي عَقِبِهِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَرْجِعُونَ
43:28.en: And he made it a word enduring among his seed, that haply they might return.

43:29.ar: بَلْ مَتَّعْتُ هَٰؤُلَاءِ وَآبَاءَهُمْ حَتَّىٰ جَاءَهُمُ الْحَقُّ وَرَسُولٌ مُبِينٌ
43:29.en: Nay, but I let these and their fathers enjoy life (only) till there should come unto them the Truth and a mess

43:30.ar: وَلَمَّا جَاءَهُمُ الْحَقُّ قَالُوا هَٰذَا سِحْرٌ وَإِنَّا بِهِ كَافِرُونَ
43:30.en: And now that the Truth hath come unto them they say: This is mere magic, and lo! we are disbelievers therein.

43:31.ar: وَقَالُوا لَوْلَا نُزِّلَ هَٰذَا الْقُرْآنُ عَلَىٰ رَجُلٍ مِنَ الْقَرْيَتَيْنِ عَظِيمٍ
43:31.en: And they say: If only this Qur'an had been revealed to some great man of the two towns?

43:32.ar: أَهُمْ يَقْسِمُونَ رَحْمَتَ رَبِّكَ ۚ نَحْنُ قَسَمْنَا بَيْنَهُمْ مَعِيشَتَهُمْ فِي الْحَي
43:32.en: Is it they who apportion thy Lord's mercy? We have apportioned among them their livelihood in the life of the

43:33.ar: وَلَوْلَا أَنْ يَكُونَ النَّاسُ أُمَّةً وَاحِدَةً لَجَعَلْنَا لِمَنْ يَكْفُرُ بِالرَّحْمَٰ
43:33.en: And were it not that mankind would have become one community, We might well have appointed, for those who disb

43:34.en: And for their houses doors (of silver) and couches of silver whereon to recline,

43:35.ar: وَزُخْرُفًا ۚ وَإِنْ كُلُّ ذَٰلِكَ لَمَّا مَتَاعُ الْحَيَاةِ الدُّنْيَا ۚ وَالْآخِرَةُ عِن
43:35.en: And ornaments of gold. Yet all that would have been but a provision of the life of the world. And the Hereafte

43:36.ar: وَمَنْ يَعْشُ عَنْ ذِكْرِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ نُقَيِّضْ لَهُ شَيْطَانًا فَهُوَ لَهُ قَرِينٌ
43:36.en: And he whose sight is dim to the remembrance of the Beneficent, We assign unto him a devil who becometh his co

43:37.ar: وَإِنَّهُمْ لَيَصُدُّونَهُمْ عَنِ السَّبِيلِ وَيَحْسَبُونَ أَنَّهُمْ مُهْتَدُونَ
43:37.en: And lo! they surely turn them from the way of Allah, and yet they deem that they are rightly guided;

43:38.ar: حَتَّىٰ إِذَا جَاءَنَا قَالَ يَا لَيْتَ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَكَ بُعْدَ الْمَشْرِقَيْنِ فَبِئْسَ
43:38.en: Till, when he cometh unto Us, he saith (unto his comrade): Ah, would that between me and thee there were the d

43:39.ar: وَلَنْ يَنْفَعَكُمُ الْيَوْمَ إِذْ ظَلَمْتُمْ أَنَّكُمْ فِي الْعَذَابِ مُشْتَرِكُونَ
43:39.en: And it profiteth you not this day, because ye did wrong, that ye will be sharers in the doom.

43:40.ar: أَفَأَنْتَ تُسْمِعُ الصُّمَّ أَوْ تَهْدِي الْعُمْيَ وَمَنْ كَانَ فِي ضَلَالٍ مُبِينٍ
43:40.en: Canst thou (Muhammad) make the deaf to hear, or canst thou guide the blind or him who is in error manifest?

43:41.ar: فَإِمَّا نَذْهَبَنَّ بِكَ فَإِنَّا مِنْهُمْ مُنْتَقِمُونَ
43:41.en: And if We take thee away, We surely shall take vengeance on them,

43:42.ar: أَوْ نُرِيَنَّكَ الَّذِي وَعَدْنَاهُمْ فَإِنَّا عَلَيْهِمْ مُقْتَدِرُونَ
43:42.en: Or (if) We show thee that wherewith We threaten them; for lo! We have complete command of them.

43:43.ar: فَاسْتَمْسِكْ بِالَّذِي أُوحِيَ إِلَيْكَ ۖ إِنَّكَ عَلَىٰ صِرَاطٍ مُسْتَقِيمٍ
43:43.en: So hold thou fast to that which is inspired in thee. Lo! thou art on a right path.

43:44.ar: وَإِنَّهُ لَذِكْرٌ لَكَ وَلِقَوْمِكَ ۖ وَسَوْفَ تُسْأَلُونَ
43:44.en: And lo! it is in truth a Reminder for thee and for thy folk; and ye will be questioned.

43:45.ar: وَاسْأَلْ مَنْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِنْ قَبْلِكَ مِنْ رُسُلِنَا أَجَعَلْنَا مِنْ دُونِ الرَّحْمَٰن
43:45.en: And ask those of Our messengers whom We sent before thee: Did We ever appoint gods to be worshipped beside the

43:46.ar: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مُوسَىٰ بِآيَاتِنَا إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ وَمَلَئِهِ فَقَالَ إِنِّي رَسُو
43:46.en: And verily We sent Moses with Our revelations unto Pharaoh and his chiefs, and he said: I am a messenger of th

43:47.ar: فَلَمَّا جَاءَهُمْ بِآيَاتِنَا إِذَا هُمْ مِنْهَا يَضْحَكُونَ
43:47.en: But when he brought them Our tokens, behold! they laughed at them.

43:48.ar: وَمَا نُرِيهِمْ مِنْ آيَةٍ إِلَّا هِيَ أَكْبَرُ مِنْ أُخْتِهَا ۖ وَأَخَذْنَاهُمْ بِالْعَذَ
43:48.en: And every token that We showed them was greater than its sister (token), and We grasped them with the torment,

43:49.ar: وَقَالُوا يَا أَيُّهَ السَّاحِرُ ادْعُ لَنَا رَبَّكَ بِمَا عَهِدَ عِنْدَكَ إِنَّنَا لَمُهْ
43:49.en: And they said: O wizard! Entreat thy Lord for us by the pact that He hath made with thee. Lo! we verily will w

43:50.ar: فَلَمَّا كَشَفْنَا عَنْهُمُ الْعَذَابَ إِذَا هُمْ يَنْكُثُونَ
43:50.en: But when We eased them of the torment, behold! they broke their word.

43:51.ar: وَنَادَىٰ فِرْعَوْنُ فِي قَوْمِهِ قَالَ يَا قَوْمِ أَلَيْسَ لِي مُلْكُ مِصْرَ وَهَٰذِهِ ال
43:51.en: And Pharaoh caused a proclamation to be made among his people saying: O my people! Is not mine the sovereignty

43:52.ar: أَمْ أَنَا خَيْرٌ مِنْ هَٰذَا الَّذِي هُوَ مَهِينٌ وَلَا يَكَادُ يُبِينُ
43:52.en: I am surely better than this fellow, who is despicable and can hardly make (his meaning) plain!

43:53.ar: فَلَوْلَا أُلْقِيَ عَلَيْهِ أَسْوِرَةٌ مِنْ ذَهَبٍ أَوْ جَاءَ مَعَهُ الْمَلَائِكَةُ مُقْتَ
43:53.en: Why, then, have armlets of gold not been set upon him, or angels sent along with him?

43:54.ar: فَاسْتَخَفَّ قَوْمَهُ فَأَطَاعُوهُ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا قَوْمًا فَاسِقِينَ
43:54.en: Thus he persuaded his people to make light (of Moses), and they obeyed him. Lo! they were a wanton folk.

43:55.ar: فَلَمَّا آسَفُونَا انْتَقَمْنَا مِنْهُمْ فَأَغْرَقْنَاهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
43:55.en: So, when they angered Us, We punished them and drowned them every one.

43:56.en: And We made them a thing past, and an example for those after (them).

43:57.ar: ۞ وَلَمَّا ضُرِبَ ابْنُ مَرْيَمَ مَثَلًا إِذَا قَوْمُكَ مِنْهُ يَصِدُّونَ
43:57.en: And when the son of Mary is quoted as an example, behold! the folk laugh out,

43:58.ar: وَقَالُوا أَآلِهَتُنَا خَيْرٌ أَمْ هُوَ ۚ مَا ضَرَبُوهُ لَكَ إِلَّا جَدَلًا ۚ بَلْ هُمْ قَ
43:58.en: And say: Are our gods better, or is he? They raise not the objection save for argument. Nay! but they are a co

43:59.ar: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا عَبْدٌ أَنْعَمْنَا عَلَيْهِ وَجَعَلْنَاهُ مَثَلًا لِبَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ
43:59.en: He is nothing but a slave on whom We bestowed favour, and We made him a pattern for the Children of Israel.

43:60.ar: وَلَوْ نَشَاءُ لَجَعَلْنَا مِنْكُمْ مَلَائِكَةً فِي الْأَرْضِ يَخْلُفُونَ
43:60.en: And had We willed We could have set among you angels to be viceroys in the earth.

43:61.ar: وَإِنَّهُ لَعِلْمٌ لِلسَّاعَةِ فَلَا تَمْتَرُنَّ بِهَا وَاتَّبِعُونِ ۚ هَٰذَا صِرَاطٌ مُسْ
43:61.en: And lo! verily there is knowledge of the Hour. So doubt ye not concerning it, but follow Me. This is the right

43:62.ar: وَلَا يَصُدَّنَّكُمُ الشَّيْطَانُ ۖ إِنَّهُ لَكُمْ عَدُوٌّ مُبِينٌ
43:62.en: And let not Satan turn you aside. Lo! he is an open enemy for you.

43:63.ar: وَلَمَّا جَاءَ عِيسَىٰ بِالْبَيِّنَاتِ قَالَ قَدْ جِئْتُكُمْ بِالْحِكْمَةِ وَلِأُبَيِّنَ ل
43:63.en: When Jesus came with clear proofs (of Allah's Sovereignty), he said: I have come unto you with wisdom, and to

43:64.ar: إِنَّ اللَّهَ هُوَ رَبِّي وَرَبُّكُمْ فَاعْبُدُوهُ ۚ هَٰذَا صِرَاطٌ مُسْتَقِيمٌ
43:64.en: Lo! Allah, He is my Lord and your Lord. So worship Him. This is a right path.

43:65.ar: فَاخْتَلَفَ الْأَحْزَابُ مِنْ بَيْنِهِمْ ۖ فَوَيْلٌ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا مِنْ عَذَابِ يَوْم
43:65.en: But the factions among them differed. Then woe unto those who do wrong from the doom of a painful day.

43:66.ar: هَلْ يَنْظُرُونَ إِلَّا السَّاعَةَ أَنْ تَأْتِيَهُمْ بَغْتَةً وَهُمْ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
43:66.en: Await they aught save the Hour, that it shall come upon them suddenly, when they know not?

43:67.ar: الْأَخِلَّاءُ يَوْمَئِذٍ بَعْضُهُمْ لِبَعْضٍ عَدُوٌّ إِلَّا الْمُتَّقِينَ
43:67.en: Friends on that day will be foes one to another, save those who kept their duty (to Allah).

43:68.ar: يَا عِبَادِ لَا خَوْفٌ عَلَيْكُمُ الْيَوْمَ وَلَا أَنْتُمْ تَحْزَنُونَ
43:68.en: O My slaves! For you there is no fear this day, nor is it ye who grieve;

43:69.en: (Ye) who believed Our revelations and were self-surrendered,

43:70.en: Enter the Garden, ye and your wives, to be made glad.

43:71.ar: يُطَافُ عَلَيْهِمْ بِصِحَافٍ مِنْ ذَهَبٍ وَأَكْوَابٍ ۖ وَفِيهَا مَا تَشْتَهِيهِ الْأَنْفُس
43:71.en: Therein are brought round for them trays of gold and goblets, and therein is all that souls desire and eyes fi

43:72.ar: وَتِلْكَ الْجَنَّةُ الَّتِي أُورِثْتُمُوهَا بِمَا كُنْتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
43:72.en: This is the Garden which ye are made to inherit because of what ye used to do.

43:73.ar: لَكُمْ فِيهَا فَاكِهَةٌ كَثِيرَةٌ مِنْهَا تَأْكُلُونَ
43:73.en: Therein for you is fruit in plenty whence to eat.

43:74.ar: إِنَّ الْمُجْرِمِينَ فِي عَذَابِ جَهَنَّمَ خَالِدُونَ
43:74.en: Lo! the guilty are immortal in hell's torment.

43:75.ar: لَا يُفَتَّرُ عَنْهُمْ وَهُمْ فِيهِ مُبْلِسُونَ
43:75.en: It is not relaxed for them, and they despair therein.

43:76.ar: وَمَا ظَلَمْنَاهُمْ وَلَٰكِنْ كَانُوا هُمُ الظَّالِمِينَ
43:76.en: We wronged them not, but they it was who did the wrong.

43:77.ar: وَنَادَوْا يَا مَالِكُ لِيَقْضِ عَلَيْنَا رَبُّكَ ۖ قَالَ إِنَّكُمْ مَاكِثُونَ
43:77.en: And they cry: O master! Let thy Lord make an end of us. He saith: Lo! here ye must remain.

43:78.ar: لَقَدْ جِئْنَاكُمْ بِالْحَقِّ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَكُمْ لِلْحَقِّ كَارِهُونَ
43:78.en: We verily brought the Truth unto you, but ye were, most of you, averse to the Truth.

43:79.en: Or do they determine any thing (against the Prophet)? Lo! We (also) are determining.

43:80.ar: أَمْ يَحْسَبُونَ أَنَّا لَا نَسْمَعُ سِرَّهُمْ وَنَجْوَاهُمْ ۚ بَلَىٰ وَرُسُلُنَا لَدَيْهِ
43:80.en: Or deem they that We cannot hear their secret thoughts and private confidences? Nay, but Our envoys, present w

43:81.ar: قُلْ إِنْ كَانَ لِلرَّحْمَٰنِ وَلَدٌ فَأَنَا أَوَّلُ الْعَابِدِينَ
43:81.en: Say (O Muhammad): If the Beneficent One hath a son, then, I shall be first among the worshippers. (But there i

43:82.ar: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
43:82.en: Glorified be the Lord of the heavens and the earth, the Lord of the Throne, from that which they ascribe (unto

43:83.ar: فَذَرْهُمْ يَخُوضُوا وَيَلْعَبُوا حَتَّىٰ يُلَاقُوا يَوْمَهُمُ الَّذِي يُوعَدُونَ
43:83.en: So let them flounder (in their talk) and play until they meet the Day which they are promised.

43:84.ar: وَهُوَ الَّذِي فِي السَّمَاءِ إِلَٰهٌ وَفِي الْأَرْضِ إِلَٰهٌ ۚ وَهُوَ الْحَكِيمُ الْعَلِي
43:84.en: And He it is Who in the heaven is Allah, and in the earth Allah. He is the Wise, the Knower.

43:85.ar: وَتَبَارَكَ الَّذِي لَهُ مُلْكُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا وَعِنْدَهُ عِل
43:85.en: And blessed be He unto Whom belongeth the Sovereignty of the heavens and the earth and all that is between the

43:86.ar: وَلَا يَمْلِكُ الَّذِينَ يَدْعُونَ مِنْ دُونِهِ الشَّفَاعَةَ إِلَّا مَنْ شَهِدَ بِالْحَقِّ
43:86.en: And those unto whom they cry instead of Him possess no power of intercession, saving him who beareth witness u

43:87.ar: وَلَئِنْ سَأَلْتَهُمْ مَنْ خَلَقَهُمْ لَيَقُولُنَّ اللَّهُ ۖ فَأَنَّىٰ يُؤْفَكُونَ
43:87.en: And if thou ask them who created them, they will surely say: Allah. How then are they turned away?

43:88.ar: وَقِيلِهِ يَا رَبِّ إِنَّ هَٰؤُلَاءِ قَوْمٌ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
43:88.en: And he saith: O my Lord! Lo! these are a folk who believe not.

43:89.ar: فَاصْفَحْ عَنْهُمْ وَقُلْ سَلَامٌ ۚ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
43:89.en: Then bear with them (O Muhammad) and say: Peace. But they will come to know.

44:2.en: By the Scripture that maketh plain

44:3.ar: إِنَّا أَنْزَلْنَاهُ فِي لَيْلَةٍ مُبَارَكَةٍ ۚ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُنْذِرِينَ
44:3.en: Lo! We revealed it on a blessed night - Lo! We are ever warning -

44:4.en: Whereon every wise command is made clear

44:5.ar: أَمْرًا مِنْ عِنْدِنَا ۚ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُرْسِلِينَ
44:5.en: As a command from Our presence - Lo! We are ever sending -

44:6.ar: رَحْمَةً مِنْ رَبِّكَ ۚ إِنَّهُ هُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
44:6.en: A mercy from thy Lord. Lo! He, even He is the Hearer, the Knower,

44:7.ar: رَبِّ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا ۖ إِنْ كُنْتُمْ مُوقِنِينَ
44:7.en: Lord of the heavens and the earth and all that is between them, if ye would be sure.

44:8.ar: لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ يُحْيِي وَيُمِيتُ ۖ رَبُّكُمْ وَرَبُّ آبَائِكُمُ الْأَوَّلِينَ
44:8.en: There is no Allah save Him. He quickeneth and giveth death; your Lord and Lord of your forefathers.

44:9.en: Nay, but they play in doubt.

44:10.ar: فَارْتَقِبْ يَوْمَ تَأْتِي السَّمَاءُ بِدُخَانٍ مُبِينٍ
44:10.en: But watch thou (O Muhammad) for the day when the sky will produce visible smoke

44:11.en: That will envelop the people. This will be a painful torment.

44:12.ar: رَبَّنَا اكْشِفْ عَنَّا الْعَذَابَ إِنَّا مُؤْمِنُونَ
44:12.en: (Then they will say): Our Lord relieve us of the torment. Lo! we are believers.

44:13.ar: أَنَّىٰ لَهُمُ الذِّكْرَىٰ وَقَدْ جَاءَهُمْ رَسُولٌ مُبِينٌ
44:13.en: How can there be remembrance for them, when a messenger making plain (the Truth) had already come unto them,

44:14.ar: ثُمَّ تَوَلَّوْا عَنْهُ وَقَالُوا مُعَلَّمٌ مَجْنُونٌ
44:14.en: And they had turned away from him and said: One taught (by others), a madman?

44:15.ar: إِنَّا كَاشِفُو الْعَذَابِ قَلِيلًا ۚ إِنَّكُمْ عَائِدُونَ
44:15.en: Lo! We withdraw the torment a little. Lo! ye return (to disbelief).

44:16.ar: يَوْمَ نَبْطِشُ الْبَطْشَةَ الْكُبْرَىٰ إِنَّا مُنْتَقِمُونَ
44:16.en: On the day when We shall seize them with the greater seizure, (then) in truth We shall punish.

44:17.ar: ۞ وَلَقَدْ فَتَنَّا قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمَ فِرْعَوْنَ وَجَاءَهُمْ رَسُولٌ كَرِيمٌ
44:17.en: And verily We tried before them Pharaoh's folk, when there came unto them a noble messenger,

44:18.ar: أَنْ أَدُّوا إِلَيَّ عِبَادَ اللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّي لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ
44:18.en: Saying: Give up to me the slaves of Allah. Lo! I am a faithful messenger unto you.

44:19.ar: وَأَنْ لَا تَعْلُوا عَلَى اللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّي آتِيكُمْ بِسُلْطَانٍ مُبِينٍ
44:19.en: And saying: Be not proud against Allah. Lo! I bring you a clear warrant.

44:20.ar: وَإِنِّي عُذْتُ بِرَبِّي وَرَبِّكُمْ أَنْ تَرْجُمُونِ
44:20.en: And lo! I have sought refuge in my Lord and your Lord lest ye stone me to death.

44:21.en: And if ye put no faith in me, then let me go.

44:22.ar: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُ أَنَّ هَٰؤُلَاءِ قَوْمٌ مُجْرِمُونَ
44:22.en: And he cried unto his Lord, (saying): These are guilty folk.

44:23.en: Then (his Lord commanded): Take away My slaves by night. Lo! ye will be followed,

44:24.ar: وَاتْرُكِ الْبَحْرَ رَهْوًا ۖ إِنَّهُمْ جُنْدٌ مُغْرَقُونَ
44:24.en: And leave the sea behind at rest, for lo! they are a drowned host.

44:25.en: How many were the gardens and the watersprings that they left behind,

44:26.en: And the cornlands and the goodly sites

44:27.en: And pleasant things wherein they took delight!

44:28.en: Even so (it was), and We made it an inheritance for other folk;

44:29.ar: فَمَا بَكَتْ عَلَيْهِمُ السَّمَاءُ وَالْأَرْضُ وَمَا كَانُوا مُنْظَرِينَ
44:29.en: And the heaven and the earth wept not for them, nor were they reprieved.

44:30.ar: وَلَقَدْ نَجَّيْنَا بَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ مِنَ الْعَذَابِ الْمُهِينِ
44:30.en: And We delivered the Children of Israel from the shameful doom;

44:31.ar: مِنْ فِرْعَوْنَ ۚ إِنَّهُ كَانَ عَالِيًا مِنَ الْمُسْرِفِينَ
44:31.en: (We delivered them) from Pharaoh. Lo! he was a tyrant of the wanton ones.

44:32.ar: وَلَقَدِ اخْتَرْنَاهُمْ عَلَىٰ عِلْمٍ عَلَى الْعَالَمِينَ
44:32.en: And We chose them, purposely, above (all) creatures.

44:33.ar: وَآتَيْنَاهُمْ مِنَ الْآيَاتِ مَا فِيهِ بَلَاءٌ مُبِينٌ
44:33.en: And We gave them portents wherein was a clear trial.

44:35.ar: إِنْ هِيَ إِلَّا مَوْتَتُنَا الْأُولَىٰ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمُنْشَرِينَ
44:35.en: There is naught but our first death, and we shall not be raised again.

44:36.en: Bring back our fathers, if ye speak the truth!

44:37.ar: أَهُمْ خَيْرٌ أَمْ قَوْمُ تُبَّعٍ وَالَّذِينَ مِنْ قَبْلِهِمْ ۚ أَهْلَكْنَاهُمْ ۖ إِنَّهُم
44:37.en: Are they better, or the folk of Tubb'a and those before them? We destroyed them, for surely they were guilty.

44:38.ar: وَمَا خَلَقْنَا السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا لَاعِبِينَ
44:38.en: And We created not the heavens and the earth, and all that is between them, in play.

44:39.ar: مَا خَلَقْنَاهُمَا إِلَّا بِالْحَقِّ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
44:39.en: We created them not save with truth; but most of them know not.

44:40.en: Assuredly the Day of Decision is the term for all of them,

44:41.ar: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِي مَوْلًى عَنْ مَوْلًى شَيْئًا وَلَا هُمْ يُنْصَرُونَ
44:41.en: A day when friend can in naught avail friend, nor can they be helped,

44:42.ar: إِلَّا مَنْ رَحِمَ اللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّهُ هُوَ الْعَزِيزُ الرَّحِيمُ
44:42.en: Save him on whom Allah hath mercy. Lo! He is the Mighty, the Merciful.

44:45.en: Like molten brass, it seetheth in their bellies

44:46.en: As the seething of boiling water.

44:47.en: (And it will be said): Take him and drag him to the midst of hell,

44:48.ar: ثُمَّ صُبُّوا فَوْقَ رَأْسِهِ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْحَمِيمِ
44:48.en: Then pour upon his head the torment of boiling water.

44:49.en: (Saying): Taste! Lo! thou wast forsooth the mighty, the noble!

44:50.ar: إِنَّ هَٰذَا مَا كُنْتُمْ بِهِ تَمْتَرُونَ
44:50.en: Lo! this is that whereof ye used to doubt.

44:51.en: Lo! those who kept their duty will be in a place secured.

44:53.en: Attired in silk and silk embroidery, facing one another.

44:54.en: Even so (it will be). And We shall wed them unto fair ones with wide, lovely eyes.

44:55.en: They call therein for every fruit in safety.

44:56.ar: لَا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا الْمَوْتَ إِلَّا الْمَوْتَةَ الْأُولَىٰ ۖ وَوَقَاهُمْ عَذَابَ الْجَح
44:56.en: They taste not death therein, save the first death. And He hath saved them from the doom of hell,

44:57.ar: فَضْلًا مِنْ رَبِّكَ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ الْفَوْزُ الْعَظِيمُ
44:57.en: A bounty from thy Lord. That is the supreme triumph.

44:58.en: And We have made (this Scripture) easy in thy language only that they may heed.

44:59.en: Wait then (O Muhammad). Lo! they (too) are waiting.

52:7.en: Lo! the doom of thy Lord will surely come to pass;

52:8.en: There is none that can ward it off.

52:9.en: On the day when the heaven will heave with (awful) heaving,

52:10.en: And the mountains move away with (awful) movement,

52:11.en: Then woe that day unto the deniers

52:12.en: Who play in talk of grave matters;

52:13.ar: يَوْمَ يُدَعُّونَ إِلَىٰ نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ دَعًّا
52:13.en: The day when they are thrust with a (disdainful) thrust, into the fire of hell

52:14.ar: هَٰذِهِ النَّارُ الَّتِي كُنْتُمْ بِهَا تُكَذِّبُونَ
52:14.en: (And it is said unto them): This is the Fire which ye were wont to deny.

52:15.ar: أَفَسِحْرٌ هَٰذَا أَمْ أَنْتُمْ لَا تُبْصِرُونَ
52:15.en: Is this magic, or do ye not see?

52:16.ar: اصْلَوْهَا فَاصْبِرُوا أَوْ لَا تَصْبِرُوا سَوَاءٌ عَلَيْكُمْ ۖ إِنَّمَا تُجْزَوْنَ مَا كُ
52:16.en: Endure the heat thereof, and whether ye are patient of it or impatient of it is all one for you. Ye are only b

52:17.en: Lo! those who kept their duty dwell in gardens and delight,

52:18.ar: فَاكِهِينَ بِمَا آتَاهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ وَوَقَاهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ عَذَابَ الْجَحِيمِ
52:18.en: Happy because of what their Lord hath given them, and (because) their Lord hath warded off from them the torme

52:19.ar: كُلُوا وَاشْرَبُوا هَنِيئًا بِمَا كُنْتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
52:19.en: (And it is said unto them): Eat and drink in health (as a reward) for what ye used to do,

52:20.ar: مُتَّكِئِينَ عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍ مَصْفُوفَةٍ ۖ وَزَوَّجْنَاهُمْ بِحُورٍ عِينٍ
52:20.en: Reclining on ranged couches. And we wed them unto fair ones with wide, lovely eyes.

52:21.ar: وَالَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَاتَّبَعَتْهُمْ ذُرِّيَّتُهُمْ بِإِيمَانٍ أَلْحَقْنَا بِهِمْ ذُرِّيَّ
52:21.en: And they who believe and whose seed follow them in faith, We cause their seed to join them (there), and We dep

52:22.en: And We provide them with fruit and meat such as they desire.

52:23.ar: يَتَنَازَعُونَ فِيهَا كَأْسًا لَا لَغْوٌ فِيهَا وَلَا تَأْثِيمٌ
52:23.en: There they pass from hand to hand a cup wherein is neither vanity nor cause of sin.

52:24.ar: ۞ وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ غِلْمَانٌ لَهُمْ كَأَنَّهُمْ لُؤْلُؤٌ مَكْنُونٌ
52:24.en: And there go round, waiting on them menservants of their own, as they were hidden pearls.

52:25.en: And some of them draw near unto others, questioning,

52:26.ar: قَالُوا إِنَّا كُنَّا قَبْلُ فِي أَهْلِنَا مُشْفِقِينَ
52:26.en: Saying: Lo! of old, when we were with our families, we were ever anxious;

52:27.ar: فَمَنَّ اللَّهُ عَلَيْنَا وَوَقَانَا عَذَابَ السَّمُومِ
52:27.en: But Allah hath been gracious unto us and hath preserved us from the torment of the breath of Fire.

52:28.ar: إِنَّا كُنَّا مِنْ قَبْلُ نَدْعُوهُ ۖ إِنَّهُ هُوَ الْبَرُّ الرَّحِيمُ
52:28.en: Lo! we used to pray unto Him of old. Lo! He is the Benign, the Merciful.

52:29.ar: فَذَكِّرْ فَمَا أَنْتَ بِنِعْمَتِ رَبِّكَ بِكَاهِنٍ وَلَا مَجْنُونٍ
52:29.en: Therefor warn (men, O Muhammad). By the grace of Allah thou art neither soothsayer nor madman.

52:30.ar: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ شَاعِرٌ نَتَرَبَّصُ بِهِ رَيْبَ الْمَنُونِ
52:30.en: Or say they: (he is) a poet, (one) for whom we may expect the accident of time?

52:31.ar: قُلْ تَرَبَّصُوا فَإِنِّي مَعَكُمْ مِنَ الْمُتَرَبِّصِينَ
52:31.en: Say (unto them): Except (your fill)! Lo! I am with you among the expectant.

52:32.ar: أَمْ تَأْمُرُهُمْ أَحْلَامُهُمْ بِهَٰذَا ۚ أَمْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ طَاغُونَ
52:32.en: Do their minds command them to do this, or are they an outrageous folk?

52:33.ar: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ تَقَوَّلَهُ ۚ بَلْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
52:33.en: Or say they: He hath invented it? Nay, but they will not believe!

52:34.ar: فَلْيَأْتُوا بِحَدِيثٍ مِثْلِهِ إِنْ كَانُوا صَادِقِينَ
52:34.en: Then let them produce speech the like thereof, if they are truthful.

52:35.ar: أَمْ خُلِقُوا مِنْ غَيْرِ شَيْءٍ أَمْ هُمُ الْخَالِقُونَ
52:35.en: Or were they created out of naught? Or are they the creators?

52:36.ar: أَمْ خَلَقُوا السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ ۚ بَلْ لَا يُوقِنُونَ
52:36.en: Or did they create the heavens and the earth? Nay, but they are sure of nothing!

52:37.ar: أَمْ عِنْدَهُمْ خَزَائِنُ رَبِّكَ أَمْ هُمُ الْمُصَيْطِرُونَ
52:37.en: Or do they own the treasures of thy Lord? Or have they been given charge (thereof)?

52:38.ar: أَمْ لَهُمْ سُلَّمٌ يَسْتَمِعُونَ فِيهِ ۖ فَلْيَأْتِ مُسْتَمِعُهُمْ بِسُلْطَانٍ مُبِينٍ
52:38.en: Or have they any stairway (unto heaven) by means of which they overhear (decrees). Then let their listener pro

52:39.en: Or hath He daughters whereas ye have sons?

52:40.ar: أَمْ تَسْأَلُهُمْ أَجْرًا فَهُمْ مِنْ مَغْرَمٍ مُثْقَلُونَ
52:40.en: Or askest thou (Muhammad) a fee from them so that they are plunged in debt?

52:41.en: Or possess they the Unseen so that they can write (it) down?

52:42.ar: أَمْ يُرِيدُونَ كَيْدًا ۖ فَالَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا هُمُ الْمَكِيدُونَ
52:42.en: Or seek they to ensnare (the messenger)? But those who disbelieve, they are the ensnared!

52:43.ar: أَمْ لَهُمْ إِلَٰهٌ غَيْرُ اللَّهِ ۚ سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
52:43.en: Or have they any god beside Allah? Glorified be Allah from all that they ascribe as partner (unto Him)!

52:44.ar: وَإِنْ يَرَوْا كِسْفًا مِنَ السَّمَاءِ سَاقِطًا يَقُولُوا سَحَابٌ مَرْكُومٌ
52:44.en: And if they were to see a fragment of the heaven falling, they would say: A heap of clouds.

52:45.ar: فَذَرْهُمْ حَتَّىٰ يُلَاقُوا يَوْمَهُمُ الَّذِي فِيهِ يُصْعَقُونَ
52:45.en: Then let them be (O Muhammad), till they meet their day, in which they will be thunder-stricken,

52:46.ar: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِي عَنْهُمْ كَيْدُهُمْ شَيْئًا وَلَا هُمْ يُنْصَرُونَ
52:46.en: A day in which their guile will naught avail them, nor will they be helped.

52:47.ar: وَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا عَذَابًا دُونَ ذَٰلِكَ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
52:47.en: And verily, for those who do wrong, there is a punishment beyond that. But most of them know not.

52:48.ar: وَاصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ فَإِنَّكَ بِأَعْيُنِنَا ۖ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ حِينَ تَقُ
52:48.en: So wait patiently (O Muhammad) for thy Lord's decree, for surely thou art in Our sight; and hymn the praise of

52:49.en: And in the night-time also hymn His praise, and at the setting of the stars.

56:1.ar: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ إِذَا وَقَعَتِ الْوَاقِعَةُ

56:2.en: There is no denying that it will befall -

56:4.en: When the earth is shaken with a shock

56:5.en: And the hills are ground to powder

56:6.en: So that they become a scattered dust,

56:7.en: And ye will be three kinds:

56:8.en: (First) those on the right hand; what of those on the right hand?

56:9.en: And (then) those on the left hand; what of those on the left hand?

56:10.en: And the foremost in the race, the foremost in the race:

56:11.en: Those are they who will be brought nigh

56:13.en: A multitude of those of old

56:14.en: And a few of those of later time.

56:17.en: There wait on them immortal youths

56:18.en: With bowls and ewers and a cup from a pure spring

56:19.en: Wherefrom they get no aching of the head nor any madness,

56:21.en: And flesh of fowls that they desire.

56:22.en: And (there are) fair ones with wide, lovely eyes,

56:24.en: Reward for what they used to do.

56:25.ar: لَا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًا وَلَا تَأْثِيمًا
56:25.en: There hear they no vain speaking nor recrimination

56:26.en: (Naught) but the saying: Peace, (and again) Peace.

56:27.en: And those on the right hand; what of those on the right hand?

56:33.en: Neither out of reach nor yet forbidden,

56:35.en: Lo! We have created them a (new) creation

56:38.en: For those on the right hand;

56:39.en: A multitude of those of old

56:40.en: And a multitude of those of later time.

56:41.en: And those on the left hand: What of those on the left hand?

56:42.en: In scorching wind and scalding water

56:45.en: Lo! heretofore they were effete with luxury

56:46.en: And used to persist in the awful sin.

56:47.ar: وَكَانُوا يَقُولُونَ أَئِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظَامًا أَإِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ
56:47.en: And they used to say: When we are dead and have become dust and bones, shall we then, forsooth, be raised agai

56:49.en: Say (unto them, O Muhammad): Lo! those of old and those of later time

56:50.en: Will all be brought together to the tryst of an appointed day.

56:51.en: Then lo! ye, the erring, the deniers,

56:52.en: Ye verily will eat of a tree called Zaqqum

56:53.en: And will fill your bellies therewith;

56:54.en: And thereon ye will drink of boiling water,

56:55.en: Drinking even as the camel drinketh.

56:56.en: This will be their welcome on the Day of Judgment.

56:57.en: We created you. Will ye then admit the truth?

56:58.en: Have ye seen that which ye emit?

56:59.en: Do ye create it or are We the Creator?

56:60.ar: نَحْنُ قَدَّرْنَا بَيْنَكُمُ الْمَوْتَ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَسْبُوقِينَ
56:60.en: We mete out death among you, and We are not to be outrun,

56:61.ar: عَلَىٰ أَنْ نُبَدِّلَ أَمْثَالَكُمْ وَنُنْشِئَكُمْ فِي مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
56:61.en: That We may transfigure you and make you what ye know not.

56:62.ar: وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْتُمُ النَّشْأَةَ الْأُولَىٰ فَلَوْلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
56:62.en: And verily ye know the first creation. Why, then, do ye not reflect?

56:63.en: Have ye seen that which ye cultivate?

56:64.en: Is it ye who foster it, or are We the Fosterer?

56:65.ar: لَوْ نَشَاءُ لَجَعَلْنَاهُ حُطَامًا فَظَلْتُمْ تَفَكَّهُونَ
56:65.en: If We willed, We verily could make it chaff, then would ye cease not to exclaim:

56:66.en: Lo! we are laden with debt!

56:68.en: Have ye observed the water which ye drink?

56:69.ar: أَأَنْتُمْ أَنْزَلْتُمُوهُ مِنَ الْمُزْنِ أَمْ نَحْنُ الْمُنْزِلُونَ
56:69.en: Is it ye who shed it from the raincloud, or are We the Shedder?

56:70.ar: لَوْ نَشَاءُ جَعَلْنَاهُ أُجَاجًا فَلَوْلَا تَشْكُرُونَ
56:70.en: If We willed We verily could make it bitter. Why then, give ye not thanks?

56:71.en: Have ye observed the fire which ye strike out;

56:72.ar: أَأَنْتُمْ أَنْشَأْتُمْ شَجَرَتَهَا أَمْ نَحْنُ الْمُنْشِئُونَ
56:72.en: Was it ye who made the tree thereof to grow, or were We the grower?

56:73.en: We, even We, appointed it a memorial and a comfort for the dwellers in the wilderness.

56:74.en: Therefor (O Muhammad), praise the name of thy Lord, the Tremendous.

56:75.en: Nay, I swear by the places of the stars -

56:76.en: And lo! that verily is a tremendous oath, if ye but knew -

56:77.en: That (this) is indeed a noble Qur'an

56:79.en: Which none toucheth save the purified,

56:80.en: A revelation from the Lord of the Worlds.

56:81.en: Is it this Statement that ye scorn,

56:82.en: And make denial thereof your livelihood?

56:83.en: Why, then, when (the soul) cometh up to the throat (of the dying)

56:84.en: And ye are at that moment looking

56:85.ar: وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْكُمْ وَلَٰكِنْ لَا تُبْصِرُونَ
56:85.en: - And We are nearer unto him than ye are, but ye see not -

56:86.en: Why then, if ye are not in bondage (unto Us),

56:87.en: Do ye not force it back, if ye are truthful?

56:88.en: Thus if he is of those brought nigh,

56:89.en: Then breath of life, and plenty, and a Garden of delight.

56:90.ar: وَأَمَّا إِنْ كَانَ مِنْ أَصْحَابِ الْيَمِينِ
56:90.en: And if he is of those on the right hand,

56:91.en: Then (the greeting) "Peace be unto thee" from those on the right hand.

56:92.ar: وَأَمَّا إِنْ كَانَ مِنَ الْمُكَذِّبِينَ الضَّالِّينَ
56:92.en: But if he is of the rejecters, the erring,

56:93.en: Then the welcome will be boiling water

56:96.en: Therefor (O Muhammad) praise the name of thy Lord, the Tremendous.

74:1.ar: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ يَا أَيُّهَا الْمُدَّثِّرُ
74:1.en: O thou enveloped in thy cloak,

74:6.en: And show not favour, seeking wordly gain!

74:7.en: For the sake of thy Lord, be patient!

74:8.en: For when the trumpet shall sound,

74:9.en: Surely that day will be a day of anguish,

74:11.en: Leave Me (to deal) with him whom I created lonely,

74:12.en: And then bestowed upon him ample means,

74:13.en: And sons abiding in his presence

74:15.en: Yet he desireth that I should give more.

74:16.en: Nay! For lo! he hath been stubborn to Our revelations.

74:17.en: On him I shall impose a fearful doom.

74:18.en: For lo! he did consider; then he planned -

74:20.en: Again (self-)destroyed is he, how he planned! -

74:22.en: Then frowned he and showed displeasure.

74:23.en: Then turned he away in pride

74:24.ar: فَقَالَ إِنْ هَٰذَا إِلَّا سِحْرٌ يُؤْثَرُ
74:24.en: And said: This is naught else than magic from of old;

74:25.en: This is naught else than speech of mortal man.

74:26.en: Him shall I fling unto the burning.

74:27.en: - Ah, what will convey unto thee what that burning is! -

74:28.en: It leaveth naught; it spareth naught

74:31.ar: وَمَا جَعَلْنَا أَصْحَابَ النَّارِ إِلَّا مَلَائِكَةً ۙ وَمَا جَعَلْنَا عِدَّتَهُمْ إِلَّا
74:31.en: We have appointed only angels to be wardens of the Fire, and their number have We made to be a stumbling-block

74:33.en: And the night when it withdraweth

74:34.en: And the dawn when it shineth forth,

74:35.en: Lo! this is one of the greatest (portents)

74:37.ar: لِمَنْ شَاءَ مِنْكُمْ أَنْ يَتَقَدَّمَ أَوْ يَتَأَخَّرَ
74:37.en: Unto him of you who will advance or hang back.

74:38.en: Every soul is a pledge for its own deeds;

74:39.en: Save those who will stand on the right hand.

74:40.en: In gardens they will ask one another

74:42.en: What hath brought you to this burning?

74:43.en: They will answer: We were not of those who prayed

74:44.en: Nor did we feed the wretched.

74:45.en: We used to wade (in vain dispute) with (all) waders,

74:46.en: And we used to deny the Day of Judgment,

74:47.en: Till the Inevitable came unto us.

74:48.en: The mediation of no mediators will avail them then.

74:49.en: Why now turn they away from the Admonishment,

74:52.ar: بَلْ يُرِيدُ كُلُّ امْرِئٍ مِنْهُمْ أَنْ يُؤْتَىٰ صُحُفًا مُنَشَّرَةً
74:52.en: Nay, but everyone of them desireth that he should be given open pages (from Allah).

74:53.en: Nay, verily. They fear not the Hereafter.

74:54.en: Nay, verily. Lo! this is an Admonishment.

74:56.ar: وَمَا يَذْكُرُونَ إِلَّا أَنْ يَشَاءَ اللَّهُ ۚ هُوَ أَهْلُ التَّقْوَىٰ وَأَهْلُ الْمَغْفِ
74:56.en: And they will not heed unless Allah willeth (it). He is the fount of fear. He is the fount of Mercy.

75:1.ar: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ لَا أُقْسِمُ بِيَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ
75:1.en: Nay, I swear by the Day of Resurrection;

75:2.en: Nay, I swear by the accusing soul (that this Scripture is true).

75:3.en: Thinketh man that We shall not assemble his bones?

75:4.ar: بَلَىٰ قَادِرِينَ عَلَىٰ أَنْ نُسَوِّيَ بَنَانَهُ
75:4.en: Yea, verily. We are Able to restore his very fingers!

75:5.en: But man would fain deny what is before him.

75:6.en: He asketh: When will be this Day of Resurrection?

75:9.en: And sun and moon are united,

75:10.en: On that day man will cry: Whither to flee!

75:12.en: Unto thy Lord is the recourse that day.

75:13.ar: يُنَبَّأُ الْإِنْسَانُ يَوْمَئِذٍ بِمَا قَدَّمَ وَأَخَّرَ
75:13.en: On that day man is told the tale of that which he hath sent before and left behind.

75:14.en: Oh, but man is a telling witness against himself,

75:16.ar: لَا تُحَرِّكْ بِهِ لِسَانَكَ لِتَعْجَلَ بِهِ
75:16.en: Stir not thy tongue herewith to hasten it.

75:17.en: Lo! upon Us (resteth) the putting together thereof and the reading thereof.

75:18.en: And when We read it, follow thou the reading;

75:19.en: Then lo! upon Us (resteth) the explanation thereof.

75:20.en: Nay, but ye do love the fleeting Now

75:22.en: That day will faces be resplendent,

75:24.en: And that day will other faces be despondent,

75:25.en: Thou wilt know that some great disaster is about to fall on them.

75:26.en: Nay, but when the life cometh up to the throat

75:27.en: And men say: Where is the wizard (who can save him now)?

75:28.en: And he knoweth that it is the parting;

75:29.en: And agony is heaped on agony;

75:30.en: Unto thy Lord that day will be the driving.

75:31.en: For he neither trusted, nor prayed.

75:33.en: Then went he to his folk with glee.

75:35.en: Again nearer unto thee and nearer (is the doom).

75:36.en: Thinketh man that he is to be left aimless?

75:37.ar: أَلَمْ يَكُ نُطْفَةً مِنْ مَنِيٍّ يُمْنَىٰ
75:37.en: Was he not a drop of fluid which gushed forth?

75:38.en: Then he became a clot; then (Allah) shaped and fashioned

75:39.en: And made of him a pair, the male and female.

75:40.ar: أَلَيْسَ ذَٰلِكَ بِقَادِرٍ عَلَىٰ أَنْ يُحْيِيَ الْمَوْتَىٰ
75:40.en: Is not He (Who doeth so) Able to bring the dead to life?
